name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Tools & Tips to vote in WI
Tools & Tips to vote in WI No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xirjjut-ahkdjtlkr-b/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirjjut-ahkdjtlkr-r/) PeterThis is it.This is the day we've planned for, waited for, and fought for. For everyone who's stuck by my side, pitched in, volunteered, or supported our campaign in any way, THANK YOU.When the votes are counted, I hope you're proud of what we've achieved.**This is our FINAL ask to spare a last-minute donation before the votes are counted on Election Day!** [Chip in $15, $40, $75, $250 or any amount!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirjjut-ahkdjtlkr-y/) Even if you've already done your part, feel free to pass this email along to anyone you think could use the extra push.
* **What are voting hours?** 7:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m. in Wisconsin
* [**Where do I vote?**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirjjut-ahkdjtlkr-j/) Click to find your polling place
* [**Confirm/Update your voting information**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirjjut-ahkdjtlkr-t/)
* [**Preview your ballot**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirjjut-ahkdjtlkr-i/)
* [**Military/Overseas voters**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirjjut-ahkdjtlkr-d/)
* **Already voted?[Track your absentee ballot](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xirjjut-ahkdjtlkr-h/)**

Thanks again,
Scott Fitzgerald
## **Join The Fight**
• Receive Campaign Updates

• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd39/18e32a7f/4bbb576c/7b20694e/77427214/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd39/18e32a7f/4bbb576c/7b20694f/77427214/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd39/18e32a7f/4bbb576c/7b20694c/77427214/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd39/18e32a7f/4bbb576c/7b206948/77427214/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd39/18e32a7f/4bbb576c/7b20694a/77427214/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd39/18e32a7f/4bbb576c/7b20694d/77427214/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: Poll Closings and More Good News...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends,

Polls have officially closed in a number of states. It's official, this country has experienced record turnout. But we also need people to STAY IN LINE. Please keep this message going.
---
|
---
| I also want to take this moment to share some more good news before elections returns really start to come in tonight...
---
|
---
| Before I do, in case you missed it earlier today: Biden for President’s Campaign Manager Jen O’Malley Dillon and former White House Counsel Bob Bauer held an election day briefing.

_**TOPLINE MESSAGES**_
* We know some results will take time but we are clear-eyed about how many paths to victory we have - and how few President Trump has.
* We believe states like Florida, Texas, Ohio, and Pennsylvania are very close. While we would love to win them and are doing everything in our power to make that happen- we don’t need to win them. Donald Trump can win these states- to do so he needs to do as well as he did in 2016 which is certainly possible.
* But for President Trump to make up ground from early voting in states like North Carolina, Georgia, Wisconsin, Michigan, and Arizona Trump will need to overperform how he did in 2016. In Michigan for example, he needs to win 62% of the Election Day vote. That’s overperforming his 2016 Election Day turnout by more than 10 points.
* So, look - there are a lot of paths to victory for us. We closed early voting in a strong position. And, again under no circumstance will Donald Trump be declared a victor tonight.

---
|
---
| **Here's even more good news over the last few hours regarding coalitions and states.**

**FL**
[Tom Bonier](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5f9e007b46&e=d6c5c7d7ec): At 4:50, the Dem lead in Leon County, FL is now 41K votes. Again, this isn't a comprehensive look at the state by any means, but if the President was banking on Republicans to swamp Democrats in Election Day turnout, it's not happening in some key counties.
[Tom Bonier](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e84a712629&e=d6c5c7d7ec): Almost 4.5 hours later, the Dem lead in Duval is >12,500 votes. GOPs are not closing the gap fast enough here to produce the result they need.*
[Nate Silver](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8645220ac8&e=d6c5c7d7ec): GOP +1.8% on turnout by party registration so far in Florida. Will probably get up to +2.0% by the end of the night though the pace of GOP gains has really slowed down.

[CBS4 Miami’s Jim DeFede](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=67d9a4a702&e=d6c5c7d7ec): Here are the 5 pm numbers for Dade
115,097 voters so far today
DEM 41,534
REP 34,130
NPA 37,576
OTHER 1,857

**MI**
[CBS News’s Adam Brewster](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1aed17fd14&e=d6c5c7d7ec): As of 4:30pm, per Michigan Secretary of State:
3.2M absentee ballots returned
18,822 new voter registrations today
Detroit (805), Ann Arbor (472) and Grand Rapids (302) had the most.

[CNN’s Omar Jimenez](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5cd4ea60aa&e=d6c5c7d7ec): Michigan officials expect the state’s vote will be counted sooner than previously expected, with both day-of and absentee ballot counts expected to be reported soon after polls close tonight, @MichSoS tells @miguelmarquez

Voting in Detroit
* More than 100K of 170K absentee ballots in Detroit are already tabulated.
* More than 18,000 eligible citizens registered *and* voted today.
* The vast majority of those 18K who registered & voted today were in Detroit, Ann Arbor & Grand Rapids.

**PA** [Reuters’s Jarrett Renshaw](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=dcb78bf47d&e=d6c5c7d7ec): In PA Montgomery County, the state’s largest suburban county, total turnout could reach nearly 90 percent of registered voters, up from roughly 77 percent in 2016, County Dem chairman Joe Foster told me **TX** [El Paso Matters’s Bob Moore](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9b2b76d770&e=d6c5c7d7ec): El Paso had 24,000 Election Day votes as of 2 p.m., keeping us on pace for a total vote today of about 42,000. El Paso has surpassed 50% turnout among registered voters for the only the second time since 2000. Houston Chronicle’s Zach Despart: As of now, #HarrisCounty is on pace for an all-time high of 1.64 million votes, with a record **88%** cast before Election Day. This means when early vote result published ~7 p.m., candidates who are trailing will have a very difficult time closing the gap b/c of so few ED votes. AAPI Turnout [Tom Bonier](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=36c0beeded&e=d6c5c7d7ec): In the presidential battleground states, the early vote from Asian Americans exceeded their total 2016 turnout by 14%. Latino voters are only 3% behind their total '16 turnout. Meanwhile, white non-college voters are 36% behind '16, a gap of more than 12 million votes. NPR's Domenico Montanaro:
[Trump approvals in some key states](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9aef8e3d54&e=d6c5c7d7ec), acc to @AP VoteCast
FL - 42/57 (strongly disapprove is 51)
AZ - 43/57
GA - 46/53
WI - 46/54
PA - 47/53
NC - 48/52
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/about?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=fd4b970e0c) [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=fd4b970e0c) [update subscription preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
DNC Community Engagement * 430 S Capitol Street, SE * Washington, DC 20003 * USA

name: Steve Chabot
subject: TODAY is the day.
body:
I'd be honored with your vote.
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jutyuljd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutyuljd-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend,In these challenging times, the fundamental choice in this election is: Which candidate will best deliver results for the hardworking people of Ohio's first congressional district, get us through the challenges we face and help us to emerge stronger than ever before on the other side.There's a clear contrast between my record of delivering results, including securing more Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) support for small businesses for the First District than any other district in Ohio, and my opponent's campaign, which is entirely based on a blatant lie meant to hide from voters that she would stand with Nancy Pelosi and the Socialist Squad to advance an extreme agenda that would devastate Ohio families.
# POLLS ARE OPEN NOW!
While my opponent has focused her campaign on false attacks and dangerous ideas, I've been working hard, every day, for the people of Cincinnati, Hamilton County and Warren County. The PPP program I helped craft brought nearly $3 billion and saved over a quarter million jobs in this district.But people are still hurting, and we continue to face unprecedented challenges. That's why I'm working closely with Governor DeWine, medical experts and first responders to keep our communities safe and get people back to work as quickly and safely as possible and why I'll continue to fight for support for our community. [HELP US CLOSE STRONG >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutyuljd-kujkulhluu-y/) To me, doing this job has always been about finding consensus and getting things done for our communities. That's why I'm also working on sensible police reforms that seek common ground, and respect and strengthen, rather than vilify, law enforcement.I'm Steve Chabot and I have spent my life dedicated to strengthening our communities. In this critical election I am asking for your vote, so that together, we can defeat the pandemic, help people weather the challenges ahead and ensure our families, small businesses and communities emerge stronger than ever before on the other side.Please make sure you get out today and vote. The polls are open until 7:30 p.m. More information on voting in-person today can be found [HERE](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutyuljd-kujkulhluu-j/).Thank you,Steve Chabot | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutyuljd-kujkulhluu-t/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutyuljd-kujkulhluu-i/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutyuljd-kujkulhluu-d/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jutyuljd-kujkulhluu-k/)
[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jutyuljd-kujkulhluu-u/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jutyuljd-l-o)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jutyuljd-961825B2-kujkulhluu-b) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jutyuljd-kujkulhluu-n/)

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: this is all thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
I couldn’t be more grateful that my neighbors, families, friends, and Hoosiers from all across Indiana put their trust in me to lead our great state | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
**We won, friend. It’s official. **

I couldn’t be more grateful that our neighbors, families, friends, and Hoosiers from all across Indiana put their trust in us to lead our great state for another four years.

**Over the last few years, together we achieved a lot — record-high wages, a record-low infant mortality rate, providing tens of thousands of Hoosiers with the skills they need to compete in a 21st-century economy, and much, much more. **

And friend, we’re just getting started.

There’s no beating around the bush — COVID-19 is an unprecedented challenge that slowed us down. But Hoosiers are the most resilient people in the world. We’re getting back on track, and our victory today is the first step toward getting our state back to setting records.

As we know, Building One Indiana for All isn’t easy, but few things that are worth doing are. It’s going to take a lot of hard work, dedication, grit, and commitment from Hoosiers like you.

I couldn’t be more grateful for your support during this campaign, and winning today is an amazing accomplishment. We should be proud of our work, and I think that tonight calls for a little bit of celebration.

But tomorrow, it’s time to get back to building One Indiana for All.

**Let’s go to work. **

Thank you for your support,

Governor Eric Holcomb
---
---
|
|
| |
---

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Peter, we’ve won!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress |
body:
We just received the numbers, and thanks to your support, we have prevented Socialism from coming to Miami! **Peter, we did it! **
**🎉WE’VE TAKEN BACK MIAMI! 🎉**
We just received the numbers, and thanks to your support, we have prevented Socialism from coming to Miami! Thank you, Peter, for helping me get here; I couldn’t have done it without your support!
I want to let you know that this journey has been incredible, and I’m so thankful you’ve had my back throughout it.
**We stood together as a community and faced down this pandemic! ** **We built a strong grassroots campaign and took back Miami for the people!**
**Peter, I'm going to bring a new voice to Congress! I will be a voice that upholds liberty, protects freedom and fights for this beautiful community of Miami!**
I’m ready to fight relentlessly every day in Congress for the people of South Florida. I love our home of Miami, and I will be a representative who is always accountable to our communities and our voters!
Peter, your faith, commitment, and support in this fight fill me with joy and extreme gratitude; I’m eternally humbled and grateful for your unwavering support throughout this journey!
_En Libertad! _
Thank you! Maria Elvira Salazar |

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Onward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891db7/7f51f7bc/58581e5a/4efb0376/31899624/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

I'm not a career politician, and running for Senate was never my plan. I'm just one of the millions of Texans who have seen the world we're giving our children and thought "hell no."

That's why I am so proud and incredibly grateful that you supported me in this campaign. Together, we have worked so hard, and overcome so much, shattering expectations along the way. We've built a powerful grassroots movement from the ground up, and I know our fight here in Texas is far from over.

To those who have supported our campaign in dozens of ways: volunteering, donating, talking to your friends and family, sharing your valuable time and money with this campaign: thank you from the bottom of my heart. Together, we've built something incredible that will have an impact on elections in Texas for decades. I am confident that the work we did will move our state forward for years to come.

Thank you for being part of this team. I hope each and every one of you will continue to work hard for a stronger, healthier, safer, more equal Texas.

Take some time to rest and recover, and then, let's get back to work. We can't give up, and we won't.

\-- MJ Hegar
---

|
---

name: Darin LaHood
subject: I can’t thank you enough for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
It may have been my name on the ballot tonight, but I can’t take all the credit for tonight’s victory | |
---
|
---
It’s official, friend!

**We won!**

On behalf of myself, my family, and everybody else on Team LaHood who has been working tirelessly on this campaign, I want to thank you for all that you’ve done to keep us going through what was a truly unpredictable election year.

**We couldn’t have done this without you.**

It may have been my name on the ballot tonight, but the credit for tonight’s victory belongs to you and to the thousands of other grassroots supporters who kept moving forward. Every single action – whether it was putting out a yard sign, attending a meet-and-greet, or donating to our re-election campaign – helped make tonight happen.

**I can’t thank you enough for that, friend.**

I couldn’t be more honored to represent your voice in the House of Representatives for two more years, and I look forward to standing by our law enforcement and first responders, upholding our Constitutional liberties, and fighting to strengthen America like we’ve done all along.

Our work is far from over – _in fact, it’s just getting started_ – and I’m beyond grateful to know that you’re always in our corner 100% of the way.

Thank you,
Darin LaHood

---
| |
---
| Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
| P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: THANK YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends,

We did it! Audrey and I cannot express how moved we are by the outpouring of support you have given us._**I am deeply honored to be your next congressman for the Big First District. **_

It is an honor to be following in the footsteps of others who have served in Congress from the Big First. The seat you elected me to is not mine, **but yours. **I vow to be an advocate for agriculture and our conservative Kansas values!

To every person who put up a sign, knocked on a door, spoke with their neighbor, and voted - **THANK YOU!** We would not have won without your efforts. This victory is yours!

Yours in the fight,

Tracey

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Vote For Bill Hagerty
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-jj/) November 3, 2020 **Vote Team Hagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-r/) Over a year ago, Team Hagerty began the journey to send Bill Hagerty to the United States Senate to represent Tennesseans and fight for our conservative values. Since then, we have grown our momentum to a statewide grassroots movement. We are so proud of all the work that has been done, from knocking doors to making calls, each and every member of Team Hagerty has played a part in getting us where we are today. Now, on Election Day, we couldn't be more excited to get out to vote for Bill Hagerty and re-elect President Trump.Watch our recap video [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-y/) **ICYMI: Boots & Jeans, BBQ & Beans** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-j/) This weekend Team Hagerty joined Tennessee Senate Majority Leader Jack Johnson for his 14th Annual Boots & Jeans, BBQ & Beans. We were joined by some of the state's biggest conservative leaders like Governor Bill Lee, Senator Marsha Blackburn, Congressman Mark Green and Lt. Governor Randy McNally. Now more than ever, it is important that we get out and support Republicans up and down the ballot. **Election Day Is Here** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! It's not just about sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must re-elect President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to make America a socialist country. There's still time to get out to vote, so head to the polls and make your voice heard!
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-t/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-i/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-d/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Local Memphis:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-h/) U.S. Senate candidate Bill Hagerty, joined by Marsha Blackburn, makes campaign stop in Shelby County****[Jackson Sun:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-k/) Hagerty, Blackburn stop in Jackson before Election Day****[Commercial Appeal:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-u/) Bradshaw and Hagerty, each confident of victory, visit Shelby County on last day of campaign****[WATE:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-o/) Tennessee U.S. Senate candidates hold rallies over the weekend**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-b/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-m/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-c/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-f/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiruuty-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_

clean_body: #TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox No images? November 3, 2020 Vote Team Hagerty Over a year ago, Team Hagerty began the journey to send Bill Hagerty to the United States Senate to represent Tennesseans and fight for our conservative values. Since then, we have grown our momentum to a statewide grassroots movement. We are so proud of all the work that has been done, from knocking doors to making calls, each and every member of Team Hagerty has played a part in getting us where we are today. Now, on Election Day, we couldn't be more excited to get out to vote for Bill Hagerty and re-elect President Trump.Watch our recap video ICYMI: Boots & Jeans, BBQ & Beans This weekend Team Hagerty joined Tennessee Senate Majority Leader Jack Johnson for his 14th Annual Boots & Jeans, BBQ & Beans. We were joined by some of the state's biggest conservative leaders like Governor Bill Lee, Senator Marsha Blackburn, Congressman Mark Green and Lt. Governor Randy McNally. Now more than ever, it is important that we get out and support Republicans up and down the ballot. Election Day Is Here We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! It's not just about sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must re-elect President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to make America a socialist country. There's still time to get out to vote, so head to the polls and make your voice heard! name: Jay Inslee
subject: Thank you for believing in progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8221%2E868730%2EJcUMR2) Friend, Tonight, Washington state has chosen to continue on the path of progress -- to defeat COVID and to rebuild stronger than ever. Thank you for your overwhelming support for my leadership. This election is not about me -- it is about the strength and resilience of the people of Washington state. When COVID hit us first, we took action, and we followed public health experts and science to battle this virus. We are still in the thick of this fight, but because of the heroic actions of our health care workers, essential employees, and Washingtonians masking up, we have fared better than nearly every other state. Because of these actions and the bold, progressive policies passed during my time as governor, we are more resilient and able to rebound once the COVID crisis is over. We are still facing great challenges, but I have never been more optimistic about our capacity to meet them. Our victory tonight is more than just a reflection of our successful past -- this is about a mandate for governing into the future. Together, through our shared determination and values, I look forward to fighting with you for a brighter future. Thank you. Very truly yours, Jay | [DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13788?t=4&akid=8221%2E868730%2EJcUMR2)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8221%2E868730%2EJcUMR2). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: This is your victory!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd35/18e32a7f/4bbdef13/7b20684f/3058106624/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "http://www.benraylujan.com/")

| | Hi there,

Our race was just called -- and I'm honored to share the news that the voters of New Mexico have elected me as their next U.S. Senator!

My name may have been the one on the ballot, but make no mistake: this was YOUR victory!

From the moment our campaign launched in April 2019, it has been a people-driven movement, powered by working folks who spent their evenings and weekends reaching out to voters about our vision for New Mexico's bright future.

Since those early beginnings, our campaign's core message has always been about the kitchen-table issues that matter to working families -- from expanding affordable health care to creating good jobs and investing in New Mexico.

As the COVID-19 pandemic touched so many families, the urgent need for progress on these issues came into sharp focus. This election, voters from Taos to Las Cruces turned out in record numbers to create a clear mandate for change.

We have a lot of work in front of us to help our country recover and rebuild from this pandemic. Over the next few weeks, that will mean supporting strong candidates in races that were too close to call tonight, and protecting voting rights across the country.

But tonight, let's celebrate -- you've earned it!

I'm so proud of what we accomplished together, and I'm humbled to have the opportunity to follow in the footsteps of great leaders like Tom Udall, Manuel Lujan, Jeff Bingaman, and Pete Domenici to deliver for New Mexico.

And most of all, I'm grateful to have earned your support.

Thank you,

Ben Ray Lujan |
---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd35/18e32a7f/4bbdef13/7b20684c/3058106624/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd35/18e32a7f/4bbdef13/7b20684d/3058106624/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd35/18e32a7f/4bbdef13/7b206842/3058106624/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As the U.S. House Representative from New Mexico's Third District, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by the American Federation of Teachers, Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd35/18e32a7f/4bbdef13/7b206843/3058106624/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/peopleforben?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=auto")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd35/18e32a7f/4bbdef13/7b206840/3058106624/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd35/18e32a7f/4bbdef13/7b206841/3058106624/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd35/18e32a7f/4bbdef13/7b20684d/3058106624/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd35/18e32a7f/4bbdef13/7b206846/3058106624/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: Andrew Garbarino
subject: The results are in!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Thank you, Peter! I couldn’t have done this without your unwavering support and
faith in my campaign!
<>

Peter, we did it!

We’ve successfully defended Long Island from Democrat control!

Thank you! I couldn’t have done this without your unwavering support and faith
in my campaign! This campaign would have never been a success without
grassroots supporters like YOU standing with me and encouraging me every step
of the way! I have been humbled by the dedication and encouragement that I have
received from every corner of our district throughout this journey.

This victory would not have been possible without the volunteers’ hard work
and dedication throughout Nassau and Suffolk County. I cannot thank you all
enough for supporting my campaign!

As the next representative of New York’s 2nd Congressional District, I will
always faithfully represent my home of Long Island and always put the needs of
its people FIRST!

I will strive each and every day to make you proud of your vote for me!

Thank you again to the voters, volunteers, and donors!

Thank you!

Andrew Garbarino

PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS

P.O. Box 101, Bayport, NY 11705

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Thank You Montana!!!!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA (R)
body:
Downing Elected Next State Auditor |
---
| |
---
| | **Thank you Montana, I am humbled by your support! Now it’s time to roll up our sleeves and get to work.**
**To my opponents, thanks for putting yourselves out there. I know it’s not easy. I’m always available to continue the conversation. Let’s find common ground and fight for all Montanans.**
**This election was about issues. I am happy to see the voters are interested in finding solutions that help all of us rather than partisan posturing. **
**Tonight, you elected me as your next Commissioner of Securities and Insurance. I do not take this lightly and will tirelessly work on your behalf. **
**To my supporters, thank you. Without you, none of this would have been possible. Thank you, thank you, thank you!**
**To those who were championing one of my opponents, my door is open. Let’s continue respectful dialog and refine ideas that make things meaningfully better for all of us.**
**To my incredible wife who’s been at my side through combat tours and now campaigns. Thank you. You're the love of my life and my best friend. **
**Tonight, we begin a new chapter in the Auditor’s office. I will continue to fight for transparency, lower health insurance and drug prices, removing meaningless regulation, and holding bad-actors accountable. **
**Thank you for believing in me, Montana!**
---
|
---
|
---

name: Ward Baker
subject: Thank You, Team Hagerty
body:
Team Hagerty -Everyone on Team Hagerty has fought every day for every inch to make this campaign one of the strongest that Tennessee has ever seen, and before the polls close this evening, I want to thank each and every one of you. Your hard work and support have been the backbone of this campaign, and we are forever grateful. I say that as the entire team continues to work until the polls close.The dedication and perseverance of our team will make the difference in this election. We should all be proud of what we have accomplished, which includes over 4 million personal voter contacts. That is the direct result of a team that does not confuse motion with progress.No one on this team wanted to be average. Every single member of this team fought every day to ensure that Bill Hagerty will be Tennessee's next Senator. There are a few members of our team I would like to spotlight:
* Our campaign manager Michael Sullivan led this team to victory, and we are so fortunate he stepped forward to lead our team.
* Braden Stover, our deputy campaign manager, was a tremendous asset to our team and defines what it means to be a team player.
* Abbi Sigler oversaw our communications strategy, and she was a huge boon for the team.
* Savannah Newhouse did a phenomenal job ensuring that our message reached Tennesseans in every corner of this state - reporters won't be getting a break anytime soon!
* Kendal Matas, who is just seventeen years old, did an incredible job recruiting, training, and guiding our volunteer grassroots efforts. She has a bright future ahead.
* Chattanooga hasn't been the same since Stan Settles set foot on UTC's campus, and he was critical to our work there and across the entire state.
* Riley Lovingood did an excellent job for us in Knoxville, and I believe he is a future star in our party.
* If you live in the Tri-Cities, you certainly know Nick Castle, who worked that region tirelessly to turn out the vote.

As we embark together on this Election Day, please know how much I appreciate you, your work, and your resolve throughout this campaign. And know too, that I will always be here for you to help with anything you ever need and support you in all that you do.I humbly thank you again.Onward,
Ward | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiyyhdy-fuutjhhtj-r/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiyyhdy-fuutjhhtj-y/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiyyhdy-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xiyyhdy-fuutjhhtj-t/)

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Team Hagerty Continues Statewide Get Out The Vote Tour
body:
**Team Hagerty Continues Statewide Get Out The Vote Tour** On Election Day, Bill Hagerty is continuing to travel across Tennessee to meet with folks as part of his Get Out The Vote Tour. Today, he traveled from East to Middle Tennessee, sharing his conservative message.**Scrambled Eggs At Scrambled Jake 's**Bill Hagerty started the morning at Scrambled Jake's with Governor Bill Haslam, local elected officials and supporters. They spoke about the need to get out and vote today for President Donald Trump. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiylhdd-fuutjhhtj-r/) **Tri-Cities TV Interviews** After spending the morning in Knox County, Team Hagerty traveled to the Tri-Cities where Bill spoke with WJHL and WCYB. He discussed how he'll continue to help strengthen our economy, create more jobs, provide law and order and protect our Tennessee values. **Johnson City Barbecue **While he was in the Tri-Cities, Bill stopped by Southern Craft BBQ with former Lt. Governor Ron Ramsey to meet and speak with Tennesseans. Team Hagerty thoroughly enjoyed the pulled pork and great conversations. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiylhdd-fuutjhhtj-y/) **Bill Hagerty On The Radio** Throughout the day, Bill called in to radio stations across Tennessee encouraging folks to get out and support President Donald Trump. It's imperative that we re-elect President Trump so we can continue to get our economy going again, create more jobs and keep America great. **Thanking Supporters At Brenthaven Cumberland Presbyterian Church** For the last stop of the Get Out The Vote Tour, Bill visited supporters at the Brenthaven Cumberland Presbyterian Church. He thanked everyone for their continued support and hard work throughout the campaign. With their support, Bill will take our Tennessee values to Washington and fight for Tennesseans alongside Senator Blackburn. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiylhdd-fuutjhhtj-j/) To stay up to date with Bill's tour, follow along on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram at @BillHagertyTN. | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiylhdd-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiylhdd-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiylhdd-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xiylhdd-fuutjhhtj-u/)
---|---|---|---

Nashville, TN 37205

---
| | Good morning Friend,
Last night our country experienced an election of historic proportions - and it’s not over.

Here’s where we are right now: many key states like Nevada, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Pennsylvania are still counting their votes - and will be for days. We should expect that this will be followed by litigation.

Here's what you can do now:

---
| |

If you are in a state in which we can connect you to ongoing ground operations, we will.

Right now we need more volunteers in Georgia, Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin.

No matter where you live, stay tuned because this is only the beginning.

name: John Carney
subject: Thank you, Delaware
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
---

Friend,

Yesterday was a victory for Delawareans across our state. We came together and voted to follow the science and to keep our most vulnerable citizens safe so that our children can go to school, and our businesses can get back on their feet.

Thank you for placing your trust in me to continue the job we started.

I, like so many of you, are praying that the American people also see victory at the national level. Joe was born for this moment. He believes in all of us more, I think, than we believe in ourselves sometimes. He has kept the faith throughout these long dark four years and despite his own personal tragedies. Somehow, as Joe so often has over the years, he picks himself up and stands ready to offer us his hand. He stands ready to pull this country out of the morass, out of the chaos, and onto higher, safer, more stable ground.

Some day soon, I hope to be able to turn our attention back to the priorities we all share. Improving our schools, especially those serving our most vulnerable students, attracting more good-paying jobs to our state and working with Mayor Purczycki to make our biggest city all it has the potential to be.

We can't do any of those things unless we work together.

I want to thank all the poll workers who worked from before sunrise to when the polls closed, to make sure every Delawarean could vote and vote safely.

Most of all, I want to thank all of you. For placing your trust in me and for giving me the privilege to serve. The last eight months have been tough, but they would've been a lot harder without the support of all of you.

Thank you for being good friends and neighbors. Now let's get back to work.

Sincerely,

John

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CEKsnQA658WUXenM7r9fXg==/MoorXJDcuSMx11c8_9fgqQ==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CEKsnQA658WUXenM7r9fXg==/ovrdRZ85x0_gIKxf5tQp_Q==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CEKsnQA658WUXenM7r9fXg==/856F7__1BkHjLny_gcXodQ==)

subject: We’re going to overtime

It's November 4th, it's been a very long night, and it looks like we are in for another long day.
Friend, -- it's November 4th, it's been a very long night, and it looks like we are in for another long day.

I'm reaching out because things are coming down to the wire. As of right now, we still have uncalled races in Michigan, Georgia, and Maine.

Friend, that's still enough to lose us the Majority. We're in overtime right now, and I need your help. name: Mike Thompson
subject: We must remain patient
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

I am humbled and honored to have earned the trust of our district to represent our community in Congress. Serving the place where I was born, grew up and raised my family is the greatest honor of my life. Know that I will work tirelessly in the upcoming Congress to ensure our district is the best place in the nation to raise a family, start a business, and retire with dignity.

Our district is facing many challenges, between the pandemic that has changed the way we live our lives and a devastating fire season that has destroyed so many homes and businesses. I know we can rise to meet this tough time. I will continue working to pass another Coronavirus relief package so we can support our local working families and small businesses that have been hit hard by the pandemic and need help. I’ll also continue working to bring back every Federal dollar and resource to help our district recover from the LNU Lightning Complex and Glass Fires. I know we can get through this by working together.

This was the most important election of my lifetime, one that will have consequences for decades to come. I am awed at the way that people in our district and across our nation turned out to vote and worked to help their friends and neighbors get out to vote. This spirit of civic service is one that we must all work to bring to our daily lives.

As the results continue to come in, I encourage you to remain patient, to listen to the election officials who finalize these races, and to always check the source of information on which you rely. We must count every ballot that was rightfully cast, this is the important promise of our democracy and we must live up to it. Whatever the results bring, know that I will continue fighting hard for our district and accomplishing the things that will move us forward.

Thank you for being part of our team,

Mike

| Friend,
I wanted to personally reach out and thank you for all of your incredible support throughout this campaign! As your next Congresswoman, I have been entrusted to represent each and every person who calls Florida's Third Congressional District home, and for that I am incredibly honored.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001J7-wB4CqFaWegXpU4wslQvo6mh3bI9s6zIRRf3YrrL7Yz0OVXoGWCWjMTnh6uitV_hVQXnVYDuXAEJjtdR_6YvB1kO31VJwC_89NyYlgw0ceHmGRnl2NeaSbeXYafZBCAYrQeReD2h6JFRtpfmCfEQ==&c=8pgXjYPuy3UzHaALJf6uQR9WqNOgBeitKS5aAKg2hXE0NYaCkfmUgg==&ch=v4tfArRlBE0ADn2eviDq_H-xmEE9nDJUAQANC2A7PuunmhEl88sgpQ==)
---
| In January, I will take an oath to the United States Constitution, not a political party, and I vow to represent all Americans.
After losing my family's cattle ranch to a failed Obama-era program in 2011, I promised myself to never give up or allow another family to have the same experience mine did. Only in the United States of America would I be able to go from being homeless to the U.S. House of Representatives in 10 years, and I will always fight for Florida's families the same way I would my own.
Thank you for standing alongside me throughout this campaign and giving me the honor of serving our community here in FL-03.
God Bless You, and God Bless America!
---

name: Dean Browning

body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I hate to alarm you during times like these, but it has become apparent that the Radical Left is attempting to STEAL THIS ELECTION.
Trump had a strong lead in Wisconsin and Michigan late last night. Then early this morning, 138,000 mail-in votes were counted in less than a few minutes in Michigan...
EVERY SINGLE ONE OF THE 138,000 MAIL-IN VOTES WENT TO BIDEN.
Now, I am not a math genius, but by merely using the law of averages, there should have been AT LEAST ONE Trump vote, particularly considering Michigan is a HUGE SWING STATE.
We knew this was coming. We knew massive mail-in votes were going to be leveraged in favor of Biden and result in blatant voter fraud by the Democrats.
Here is the deal: NO CONCESSIONS!
Even if this matter has to go all the way to the Supreme Court in order to hold Joe Biden's campaign accountable for their election crimes and to ensure President Donald J. Trump is rightly re-elected.
We need your help, though. We are past the midnight hour, and we need to take action NOW!
Will you donate $500, $250, or even just $50 so we can fight back against this blatant voter fraud in Michigan and Wisconsin?
---
| | | [Donate Now!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YD5KoFoczg_Pwrt9RzSsCehqoe6pV5_LPHsrxfU224plPvHX2dBC5bOsDmfCG5k78BJAzkX3OvbLYDSlztd6NRwERu9--SZYeuaOmETd_DQoKHPuLdlJAX6pRjm0ipMYhGsi9GAHnDJvr8f9ZKOZ-92H19vNdMzUroQ0Whm3oLWCQ4esdlynngoQzKcJ2u3ly0wQMjsSwbk=&c=INU5hWHr6he8j-7-TaaakUHYyMkeunVQlq6bFbdQfCu8rJ2OUulLKw==&ch=IRAaVZ2cT5pjvzKujcv30Sg7l76MpT8TNfmiKIApaOOEEsE4KTkxig==)
---
| As citizens, we have all fought hard for our President and done what we can to help.
I understand you may be tired and wishing this election was over.
But the truth is... THIS ELECTION IS NOT OVER!
Now more than ever, we need that final surge of energy. One last push to ensure democracy and freedom will be triumphant over corruption and greed.
Please make a generous donation today, and that will give us the momentum to make a difference.
Trust me, a gift of even just $25 right now could impact this country's direction for the next decade.
---
| | | [Donate Now!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YD5KoFoczg_Pwrt9RzSsCehqoe6pV5_LPHsrxfU224plPvHX2dBC5bOsDmfCG5k78BJAzkX3OvbLYDSlztd6NRwERu9--SZYeuaOmETd_DQoKHPuLdlJAX6pRjm0ipMYhGsi9GAHnDJvr8f9ZKOZ-92H19vNdMzUroQ0Whm3oLWCQ4esdlynngoQzKcJ2u3ly0wQMjsSwbk=&c=INU5hWHr6he8j-7-TaaakUHYyMkeunVQlq6bFbdQfCu8rJ2OUulLKw==&ch=IRAaVZ2cT5pjvzKujcv30Sg7l76MpT8TNfmiKIApaOOEEsE4KTkxig==)

Fight On,
---

| Dean Browning Chairman Common Sense Solutions, PAC

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, I hate to alarm you during times like these, but it has become apparent that the Radical Left is attempting to STEAL THIS ELECTION. Trump had a strong lead in Wisconsin and Michigan late last night. Then early this morning, 138,000 mail-in votes were counted in less than a few minutes in Michigan... EVERY SINGLE ONE OF THE 138,000 MAIL-IN VOTES WENT TO BIDEN. Now, I am not a math genius, but by merely using the law of averages, there should have been AT LEAST ONE Trump vote, particularly considering Michigan is a HUGE SWING STATE. We knew this was coming. We knew massive mail-in votes were going to be leveraged in favor of Biden and result in blatant voter fraud by the Democrats. Here is the deal: NO CONCESSIONS! Even if this matter has to go all the way to the Supreme Court in order to hold Joe Biden's campaign accountable for their election crimes and to ensure President Donald J. Trump is rightly re-elected. We need your help, though. We are past the midnight hour, and we need to take action NOW! Will you donate $500, $250, or even just $50 so we can fight back against this blatant voter fraud in Michigan and Wisconsin? | | | == | As citizens, we have all fought hard for our President and done what we can to help. I understand you may be tired and wishing this election was over. But the truth is... THIS ELECTION IS NOT OVER! Now more than ever, we need that final surge of energy. One last push to ensure democracy and freedom will be triumphant over corruption and greed. Please make a generous donation today, and that will give us the momentum to make a difference. Trust me, a gift of even just $25 right now could impact this country's direction for the next decade. | | | == | It is our time to rise up and defend the principles of freedom and democracy. Fight On, | | Dean Browning Chairman Common Sense Solutions, PAC P.S. - Did you see that the Radical Left is trying to STEAL THIS ELECTION in Wisconsin and Michigan? We need to make one last push to ensure Donald Trump gets re-elected. Friend, the last two years have been an uphill battle and last night was even harder yet -- but the fight's not over yet.

This race is STILL too close to call. Right now we're within 1,293 votes of Pelosi's Far Left candidate _and there are still thousands of votes to be counted. That means we 're still in this to win it._

But, we've been in an all-out sprint and we're strapped. Funding ads and expanding our GOTV efforts -- all the reasons the latest polling had us IN THE LEAD -- took everything we had. We emptied our pockets to stay competitive, but now we need your help to fight.

[**Can you chip in $5, $10, or even $25 right to our Recount Fund to help us win this final battle?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k4HEkOk3o93JaFyl5hMMxnebrP9CXsLf6_xtb8VjOPFI9MV1QHnV768aLxLVg6P_Tzp4e9SPnPr9aegGYI6tsZtufD5dBdj5Jl9MPziJz8WSr-sVA1RGoYSi6umtlc9PvkeW9IXj34KJhMTvW40rFMiRFK_NQXGQIKEAxh-j1CsNcm9QOB2sy9MXfmXElK4q2yG8zg5VXPpe5DGOoQSJ1OUfdSXYId1YckLp1VV8nAAY-H8KDqG6YptxYhOiTJBLngYa-nGDJInPy99-3Xl3hiH41yhvlUUH4OdVoerq4acrGzKUaB8DjFaDwTIH12-j5SQWPtoLMM3nvxmQp7_OKYC_TWnXjPNRFZKAbL6BYQ-OC6tsUpOTzPjgpe-Wi33aSQFJL576N5yum6v23bbEoqQMdkjtDVlVm4OpZAr3yZl_zcpsaryvBXgxdtUBN8y9&c=yWScWBxHEker0RbPbdI_tJsVNmry9Eicn8QtmELDEbJ9gaBVZXDYbA==&ch=9xrZoFYn3-DvmyecdCLkAZnGfIWyGt7jwaQygF5EW0ereYkclyn3Rg==)

We need to be able to fight this until the bitter end. Giving up now would be a disservice to the last two years of support, dedication, and service you've given to this campaign, Friend.

But, it won't be easy. Nancy Pelosi is more determined than ever to install a Far Left puppet in every single seat across the nation. She and her band of Far Left Democrats have record-breaking, war chest busting cash stockpiles to pay for an army of attorneys. She's prepared to drag this out in court and find every legal loophole.

[**I need your immediate help. name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
subject: Thank you, Vermont!
body:
Vermonters have spoken and I’m humbled to earn your support once again. |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b622cfab26&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Vermonters have spoken and I’m so humbled to earn your support once again.

Your faith and trust in me is the greatest honor of my life and I will continue to work every single day to make the lives of Vermonters better, our economy stronger and our state more affordable for families and businesses.

As you know, we’re facing some of the greatest challenges of our lifetime. This global pandemic has impacted all of us in so many ways. Our way of life has been disrupted, there’s a lot of uncertainty and far too many lives and livelihoods have been lost.

I’m proud of how Vermonters have stepped up and met the moment. It’s because of you — your hard work, your compassion for others and your commitment to community — that Vermont has led the nation.

But, as I’ve said many times, we cannot let our guard down. And as we enter the winter months, we must remain vigilant. If we do, I’m confident we’ll continue to lead the nation and more importantly, keep our loved ones safe, our kids in school and emerge from this pandemic faster and stronger than any other state.

As well as thanking you, I want to thank my entire team, who have been instrumental in leading the state’s response — from my staff and Cabinet, to our health experts and the dedicated public servants throughout state government. They’ve worked incredibly hard on the front lines of this fight for more than eight months. Each one of them has my deepest respect and appreciation, and I’m fortunate to have them by my side as we begin another term.

I ran for Governor because I believe Vermont can build a stronger and more diverse economy, be more affordable for families and businesses, and create more opportunities for our kids. And I believe the best way to have the resources to take care of those in need, protect our environment and address climate change is to grow the economy in all 251 communities and all 14 counties in Vermont — not just in a few.

On my very first day in office, almost four years ago, I signed an executive order outlining my strategic goals to grow the economy, make Vermont more affordable, and protect the most vulnerable. And while we’ve made progress, I know there is still so much more to do.

I want to assure you, even as we face and fight this virus, these priorities will be just as important during my next term as they were in my first, and they will continue to guide my team as we rebuild and recover from the pandemic. *** But perhaps even more importantly, we must heal our country because we simply cannot go on like this. Our nation is hurting, not just from COVID-19, but because of another virus that has infected the hearts and minds of too many Americans: That of hate, fear and division.

We must confront this with the same force and energy we’re putting toward the coronavirus. And here’s how: First, let’s be better, kinder and more understanding; let’s listen to and learn from one another; and let’s prioritize our common humanity, our love of family and our concern for their health and welfare.

Right now, we’re seeing a political system that defines anyone you disagree with as the enemy. The truth is, disagreeing about taxes, fees, regulations and programs, or which candidate to support — these things don’t make us enemies. A healthy democracy requires passionate debate, but it needs to be civil.

When they become nasty, personal and, even worse, violent, that’s when our real enemies — those who don’t believe in core American values — gain ground. Because they use the distraction to fan the embers of hate, fear and division.

We’ve got to rise above them to move America forward. All of us — moderates, conservatives, and liberals; Republicans, independents, and Democrats — can succeed if we work together.

Don’t misunderstand me. I’m not saying to avoid heated debate because as I said, debate is healthy. But in order to solve problems and help people, we must find common ground and then work from there.

Just as Vermont has been a leader in our response to the pandemic, I believe we can lead the way in this regard as well.

We can be better role models and treat everyone with the dignity and respect they deserve, especially when we disagree. We can prove that our strength is in the diversity of our people and opinions and show that by listening to and learning from each other, we can achieve equal rights, equal justice, equal opportunity and a more perfect union.

So today — even though we don’t know the outcome of many races — as Vermonters and as Americans, let’s come together and rise above the hate, fear and division so we can emerge from this difficult time in our history as a stronger, more united, and more compassionate nation than ever before.

Thank you again for your faith and trust in me. I’ll continue to do my very best for all Vermonters.
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8261d2e21e&e=19cebfe173)

| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=406baf1634&e=19cebfe173)

---
| | Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer,
P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=fd51c8eb56)

body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Good Morning Friends- ** **I know for many it was a very late night. ** **We need your help in letting folks know that there are still lots of votes to count, and we feel good about where we are. Joe Biden remains on track to win this election.** ** ** **To that end, there will be an election briefing with Jen O'Malley Dillon and Bob Bauer today at 10AM EST. The briefing will be livestreamed on[ JoeBiden.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=dc877ec292&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and all of the campaign’s platforms.** ** ** **I hope you are able to join.** ** ** **Yours in the Fight,** **Mũthoni**

name: Taylor Campaign
subject: Thank you.
body:
---
| | | | | | Wednesday, November 4th 2020
---
|
---
| A message from Scott...
---
| Congratulations to Congresswoman Luria. Let us all hope that she is successful in her next two years as our representative in Washington.
Thank you to my wonderful family and friends who have supported me throughout my political endeavors, both the highs and the lows.
Deep gratitude to my team. You amazed me with your grit and tenacity. I have been in 11 political races, and I know of no finer political team or harder workers. You left it all on the field, and I am both thankful for and proud of you all. Being outspent over 4-to-1, our team's performance was excellent to make this race so competitive.
People may not like politicians, or even politics, but that is the medium through which we control our destiny. I am truly appreciative for the honor and the privilege of having served you as a U.S. Navy SEAL, Virginia Delegate, and U.S. Congressman. We indeed live in the best country in the world, where one can raise his or her station in life through hard work, persistence, and a little luck.
There is currently a division in our nation that seems unbearable to many, but throughout our short American history, we have struggled through turmoil before. Over time, I believe that the push and pull of democracy within our great, flexible republic strengthens the fabric of our society and keeps us heading in the direction of that ever elusive, more perfect union.
Thank you for all the love and support. God Bless our great nation.
---
|
---
| | |
---
| We are deeply grateful for all your hard work throughout this campaign. We appreciate your generous, ongoing support! This race would not have been so competitive without the support of your time and resources. -Team Taylor
---

name: Matt Mowers
subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress |
body:
We may not have won the election, but we should be damn proud of what we’ve done. | |
---
|
---
The ballots are in and it’s official, friend - Chris Pappas won the election.

I want to congratulate Congressman Pappas on a hard-fought victory and wish him well as he serves our nation and our state.

**Now that the campaign is behind us, I hope that Congress gets to work.** Small businesses need critical relief, middle class families need economic opportunity, and our first responders need our support.

From day one, this race has always been about standing with those who feel forgotten by Washington politicians, whether it's our law enforcement community or middle-class families trying to make ends meet.

**I will never stop fighting for them or our Live Free or Die values.**

Despite a disappointing loss, we should be damn proud of what we’ve done. I am grateful to all of my supporters, whose enthusiasm energized me every day on the campaign trail and allowed us to run a strong race that presented the voters with a clear choice.

_**To every person on the campaign trail I met - Thank you. I will never forget you.
**_
\- Matt
---
---
| |
---

| P.O. Box 10297, Bedford, N.H. 03110 |

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Because of people like you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
We did it! Because of the hard work and generosity of people like you, I'm headed back to Washington for two more years to fight for the people CA-38. I wanted to personally reach out to all my supporters and say thank you.

Because of your help, I can keep working to ensure every parent has paid family leave.

Because of your help, I can keep demanding that we pass meaningful immigration reform.

Because of your help, I can keep protecting millions of Americans' access to healthcare and affordable prescription drugs.

I am so proud to represent California's 38th district and the resilient, compassionate people who live here. It is the honor of a lifetime and one I carry with me every day.

So, thank you for allowing me the privilege of being your Representative.

Together, we've already accomplished something huge. And with you on my team, I know there are only bigger things to come in the next two years.

Thank you again,

-- Linda Sánchez

subject: I warned the Nation

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
---
[]()
| | | Thank you, Peter.

**Thank you for electing me as your Governor for another 4 years. Serving in this office has been the honor of my life. I am grateful and humbled to the people who have trusted me to continue the progress that we 've already made here.**

As I write this email, we await election results that I hope will change the direction of our country and we will continue in that effort regardless of the outcome.

I spent much of the last four years visiting communities big and small all around our state. And no matter where I was, I found the same thing - North Carolinians are resilient. We are creative. We are innovative. Cooperative. Inclusive. And we do not give up easily.

And that's good, because in order to move forward in the coming weeks, we have a hard job ahead, and we have to get on with it. We have to work harder than ever to understand each other's perspective. To strive to respect each other even though our political beliefs may still be different. Then we need to come together as a state and realize North Carolina's boundless potential.

Now a lot of people may be wondering How? How in the aftermath of this rough election? How in the middle of a global pandemic? How with racial strife dividing many of our communities? How do we come together now?

It's time that we focus on what we have in common, rather than on our differences. Regardless of our political beliefs, most all of us want people to be healthy, to have a good paying job, and to live in safe communities. And we value our shared freedom that this great country has given us.

As we heal, we must focus on the priorities. Affordable health care. Public schools that can thrive. Clean air and water, no matter where you live. A reckoning of the systems that have excluded too many people. A steadfast commitment to strong and safe communities. An economy that will come back stronger for everyone - not just those at the top.

**Today and for the next four years, I will work hard to be the Governor of every single North Carolinian.**

Thank you for your continued trust in me,

Roy
---

---

| Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

subject: We Thank You!
body:
Thank You All! Thank you, thank you for being here. Thank you. I am so proud of all of you. We hold our heads up. Be proud of what you’ve accomplish
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=277243.1219.1.4aac411c273a6a4b2e8b2cc4e1c67f07)
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=277243.1220.1.81fc62ff231ca717497bdff64db30d5d&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MDY5MzUwMC0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My0xYzg4MDNlMjQ5YTFlOTIyOWIwNjVjMTJiODQyOWIxNDhlZDhiNjA1IiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjI3NzI0MyJ9) |
---
# Thank You All!
---
Thank you, thank you for being here. Thank you. I am so proud of all of you. We hold our heads up. Be proud of what you’ve accomplished. I know I am. Because in this campaign we started something. We started this campaign with nothing. Nothing but an idea: Equality and equity for everyone and every community. We had nothing in our treasury against Andy’s $1.5 million. No one knew who we were. No one thought we had a chance. It was a true David vs. Goliath fight – except this time, David was an LGBTQ woman. But thanks to you -- you the volunteers and campaign staff who worked long hours and reached every corner of our district on both sides of the Bay; you the people who donated because you believed in us. And you, Sarah, my beloved spouse, who has supported me and inspired me and shares this accomplishment tonight with me – thanks to all of you, the voters heard our message. They understood that you can get sick and get a huge medical bill and need good, affordable health insurance whether you are a Republican or Democrat. They understood that your house can be flooded by tidal floods due to climate change whether you are a Republican or Democrat. Voters began to get our progressive message, even in the most conservative district, because at its core it is based on one important truth: We are all more alike than we are different. We have started something, a movement, and it will continue to grow. We proved that the message we are talking about resonates and you can win with it, given half a chance. I never thought I’d be the first of something. And everyone that knows me knows I’m not one to bring up such things. But I know representation matters and I’m proud that I’ve been able to be an inspiration to so many. I am not disappointed. I am invigorated. You may all be used to Democratic politicians coming in and running and then disappearing. Well, that’s not me. I am not going anywhere. Starting tomorrow, we will continue our efforts to build our party in each county throughout the district. To build energy for the next election. And to keep an eye on Andy Harris. I will continue to fight for all of you whether you voted for me or not. And we know this District is changing so we can run for Congress again. And next time, we will win without any pandemic in our way. Thanks again for all of your support and help. Now have a good, but safe time. You’ve earned it. And tomorrow, let’s get back to work. Thank you! ~Mia Mason
---
---
**Warm Regards,** **Friends of Mia Mason**
---

clean_body: Thank You All! Thank you, thank you for being here. Thank you. I am so proud of all of you. We hold our heads up. Be proud of what you’ve accomplish | | | Thank You All! Thank you, thank you for being here. Thank you. I am so proud of all of you. We hold our heads up. Be proud of what you’ve accomplished. I know I am. Because in this campaign we started something. We started this campaign with nothing. Nothing but an idea: Equality and equity for everyone and every community. We had nothing in our treasury against Andy’s $1.5 million. No one knew who we were. No one thought we had a chance. It was a true David vs. Goliath fight – except this time, David was an LGBTQ woman. But thanks to you -- you the volunteers and campaign staff who worked long hours and reached every corner of our district on both sides of the Bay; you the people who donated because you believed in us. And you, Sarah, my beloved spouse, who has supported me and inspired me and shares this accomplishment tonight with me – thanks to all of you, the voters heard our message. They understood that you can get sick and get a huge medical bill and need good, affordable health insurance whether you are a Republican or Democrat. They understood that your house can be flooded by tidal floods due to climate change whether you are a Republican or Democrat. Voters began to get our progressive message, even in the most conservative district, because at its core it is based on one important truth: We are all more alike than we are different. We have started something, a movement, and it will continue to grow. We proved that the message we are talking about resonates and you can win with it, given half a chance. I never thought I’d be the first of something. And everyone that knows me knows I’m not one to bring up such things. But I know representation matters and I’m proud that I’ve been able to be an inspiration to so many. I am not disappointed. I am invigorated. You may all be used to Democratic politicians coming in and running and then disappearing. Well, that’s not me. I am not going anywhere. Starting tomorrow, we will continue our efforts to build our party in each county throughout the district. To build energy for the next election. And to keep an eye on Andy Harris. I will continue to fight for all of you whether you voted for me or not. And we know this District is changing so we can run for Congress again. And next time, we will win without any pandemic in our way. Thanks again for all of your support and help. Now have a good, but safe time. You’ve earned it. And tomorrow, let’s get back to work. Thank you! ~Mia Mason Warm Regards, Friends of Mia Mason "Facebook" "Instagram" "Twitter" "YouTube" ©2020 Mia Mason for Congress | 600-B Abruzzi Dr suite 112, Chester, MD 21619 | = "Web Version" "Preferences" "Forward" "Unsubscribe" | ?

Traveling the state for the past 14 months, I have been inspired by my fellow Granite Staters, who faced incredible challenges these last few months and have shown great resilience and courage.
This campaign has been an amazing journey, and I am grateful for the experience. And now, we must come together to meet the many challenges we face. We need to restore our economy, address the issues that divide us, and ensure that we emerge from this pandemic stronger as a nation and as a people.
I will continue to be involved in Republican politics and will work to preserve our individual liberty and economic freedom.

This campaign was only possible through your support. Whether it was by donations, volunteering your time, or sharing my message online and with those in your community, I want to extend my most sincere thank you. name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: UPDATE: Make sure Georgia votes are counted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ec/34a064cc/1a7f85b3/7023347/1461578050/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - **We need your help to contact voters across the state and ensure their votes are counted.** You can start helping right away! Here are two ways to get trained up and ready to go:
* **First, you can watch[this pre-recorded training](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ec/34a064cc/1a7f85b3/7023344/1461578050/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1CYkTiEP2doI2DmZbynW17TXeDf1FRMSg/view")** and [sign up here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ec/34a064cc/1a7f85b3/7023345/1461578050/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScQtCEq9gcpjcKGemTLqxCMUAbSmm26XkE46pCVrO8hwq680A/viewform?gxids=7628") for instructions on how to get going right away! Even though the training is prerecorded, you will have the chance to ask any questions before you get started.
* **You can also join two LIVE training sessions** later today by signing up at [https://tinyurl.com/GeorgiaTraining. ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ec/34a064cc/1a7f85b3/7023342/1461578050/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__tinyurl.com_GeorgiaTraining&d=DwMGaQ&c=XRWvQHnpdBDRh-yzrHjqLpXuHNC_9nanQc6pPG_SpT0&r=ohHmvs9zFsftJSG1ogAi2kAlp_MVVjeXcQm3530lljc&m=R5MZbqyoDxfwuSoHj4uH3ixheDC-OXUwVToKjWyIJf0&s=yrB0fj_4uVcx_Ca-K416s7fR745Kk6TvAR6FEx2lSAY&e=")

**Did you vote on a paper or provisional ballot in-person on Election Day, and NOT on a voting machine?** If so, you may need to take additional action (called "curing") to make sure your vote counted. Please call the Georgia Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to make sure your vote is counted and your voice is heard. **Remember -- you only have until Friday, November 6 to cure your provisional ballot. **Please ensure your vote is counted TODAY. If you're not sure if you voted provisionally, call the hotline at 888-730-5816.
* **If you voted on a paper or provisional ballot at the polls,** please call the Georgia Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to ensure your vote is counted and to confirm if you need to take additional action.
* **If you want to confirm that your mail ballot is counted,** go to [www.mvp.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ec/34a064cc/1a7f85b3/7023343/1461578050/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov") and enter your information on the right. Once you are in your "My Voter Page", click on "Click here for Absentee Ballot Status" on the bottom left. If your ballot status is "Rejected", "Challenged", or if you have any questions about your ballot status, please call the Georgia Voter Protection Hotline immediately at 888-730-5816.

The will of the people prevails when every eligible vote counts. Don't wait-- make sure your vote counts and your voice is heard. \- Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

The fate of this seat is still up in the air and last night proved that every ounce of support in this election matters. _Rest assured: this fight 's not over yet. We still have a chance to win this but I need your help now. _
