name: Senator Kelly Loeffler
subject: A Post-Election Note from Kelly Loeffler
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friends,
It's official: we've made it into the runoff. I could not be more honored or excited to continue this fight with you - and I wanted to take a moment to say THANK YOU for your incredible efforts over the last ten months.
We couldn't have done it without you. From the countless rallies and meet-and-greets, to the early mornings and late nights talking to voters - you have been fighting alongside us through it all.
Your support got us across the finish line victorious - and I am forever humbled by the confidence that you've placed in me to continue fighting for our conservative values and delivering results for Georgia families.
But our fight is not over yet. You've probably already seen the headlines: my seat is now the #1 target for national Democrats trying to win control of the United States Senate, and they're already making a nation-wide push to try and take it from us.
They know that if they win this seat on January 5th, they'll have a rubber stamp to pass their radical agenda of socialized medicine, massive tax increases, open borders, defunding the police, and the Green New Deal.
Georgia is America's last line of defense against the radical Left - and it'll take everything we've got to keep this state red.
So I'm asking for your help one more time - as we fight together over the next nine weeks to win this senate seat and preserve the American Dream for all Georgians.
Right now, the best way you can help is by [donating](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jADw1ILrOgHOgWlsHmK_zfZ-NuVYg1A33MQQ0BLoC5RIuWVh7IIrq_4c54CaZ0oR2EkkdrxKaDCJ01iBs465y4NX3rx8acBoDci-kSL3CYzwIe9zmTUyypR9P0zPDtRSDj0GvAaN0rEG9ufCzvb3EeiBWfTOTNsuqDqcuBk5wNInyyqRoLQPjOr476M529hm&c=l1YtRFuZCbPYxCQxCi_qSlfXuPS8kJnpfb-eq0DXdF6g08HBrILQFQ==&ch=bxfaunBKw0jmYdZzCV-na2g3PloecCEfHiIQK39Z8Bqn07GMukSSwQ==) to my campaign - whether it's $25, $10, or $5 - so that we can keep up with the millions in out-of-state funding that Chuck Schumer and liberals are already pouring into my opponent's campaign.
We only have nine weeks to get this done. Please consider [volunteering](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jADw1ILrOgHOgWlsHmK_zfZ-NuVYg1A33MQQ0BLoC5RIuWVh7IIrq85pHw6_Q2I1IIC4H-LvaSatmdDLOMT6h-2OmHuw2ghSiH-vW7EUJhKFcpPjUXWObRZdwr4Zc-zumN5Syql2vUMR05ngxJCIa5g-fUJ6xPt5ugY5zbpzq6g=&c=l1YtRFuZCbPYxCQxCi_qSlfXuPS8kJnpfb-eq0DXdF6g08HBrILQFQ==&ch=bxfaunBKw0jmYdZzCV-na2g3PloecCEfHiIQK39Z8Bqn07GMukSSwQ==) to help us get across the finish line - because in a race this close, every single call, text, and yard sign will count on Election Day.
Again, thank you from the bottom of my heart for your support and hard work. With just a little more work over the next two months, I know we will be fighting for our conservative values and delivering results for Georgia's families for years to come.

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Thank you, Central Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Friends,

Last night, we came up a little short in our effort to flip this seat.

It is my hope that Mr. Sessions sees this win not as an opportunity to return to Congress and resume business as usual, but as a mandate to use his experience and seniority to the benefit of the people of Central Texas and the country.

To Central Texas: Don’t stop fighting for what you deserve. We still need to improve our access to rural broadband. We still need more comprehensive, less expensive health care. And we all deserve a Washington that puts practical solutions ahead of partisan bickering.

Before I end this note, I want to thank all of my amazing team — volunteers, activists, grassroots donors, and supporters around the district and the state.

So, thank you, again.

- Rick

Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
Rick Kennedy for Congress
2203 Emmett Pkwy
Austin, TX 78726
www.RickKennedyforCongress.com [http://www.RickKennedyforCongress.com]

body:
We need your help
The future of our country is at stake, Friend, and we need your help.
Flush with cash from liberal billionaires like George Soros, the Radical Left is doing everything within their power to WIPE OUT State Republicans and seize state legislatures across the country.
We still have Republican seats that have yet to be called and they need our help RIGHT NOW if Republicans want to claim a victory!
[**For the next 24 hours, all donations will be 4X MATCHED to ensure we have what it takes to defend Conservatives in the states until every ballot is counted! Can you donate today?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HvSRw6_woubJcLKc0CveXm1f4t_9hsH7Qp1EB4k3NyCRz8cqea-Vjyb8HCV7TsRTTU2u3UOq60hx2-YdT8dB2dp8vQm88BZPl-2UwSh11ED4v0zjbTVfN9ykp_n-6CWmRlxSgtEzhvH5QLOQCQ7JuBkKIB_K8uri76R4v_ViQDJGagoXs1Ff3Gn-JXvrTtexjPvX_puve6cgVQjYoCrLYPU_86ds11_f9r4SrT5dbiLP7OyIKW2cH3dEZoQuM2jkvr4V98V1LFChOzwTxHSqkdHRZhaQgz70HQ_2dNfifqeWkmM8e4lkUKnIhwVZ7K1oBZbOGWWsBGHSuFB4mOBXjybUOpHJdOPL-tKtQdo124JvjN5KS312PUzMuk9GyxNxRJN310lxNP2Kz88Svycapw6pHfiiHZ22P0NMj3bVXDc9OtICdFW7TC2UM6LtjfhuiSPBXFALHoo=&c=SENYGCYXRlOWHPysfJitzH6oKPXORVmdNn0pU6SrfSnMJQdJycH32w==&ch=KQQivQRw4tCpiM8CPUimLB2vg1nQgRDEV0ntHyPOPVaSJ_sSOMv7aw==)
**[**MAKE 4X IMPACT NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HvSRw6_woubJcLKc0CveXm1f4t_9hsH7Qp1EB4k3NyCRz8cqea-Vjyb8HCV7TsRTTU2u3UOq60hx2-YdT8dB2dp8vQm88BZPl-2UwSh11ED4v0zjbTVfN9ykp_n-6CWmRlxSgtEzhvH5QLOQCQ7JuBkKIB_K8uri76R4v_ViQDJGagoXs1Ff3Gn-JXvrTtexjPvX_puve6cgVQjYoCrLYPU_86ds11_f9r4SrT5dbiLP7OyIKW2cH3dEZoQuM2jkvr4V98V1LFChOzwTxHSqkdHRZhaQgz70HQ_2dNfifqeWkmM8e4lkUKnIhwVZ7K1oBZbOGWWsBGHSuFB4mOBXjybUOpHJdOPL-tKtQdo124JvjN5KS312PUzMuk9GyxNxRJN310lxNP2Kz88Svycapw6pHfiiHZ22P0NMj3bVXDc9OtICdFW7TC2UM6LtjfhuiSPBXFALHoo=&c=SENYGCYXRlOWHPysfJitzH6oKPXORVmdNn0pU6SrfSnMJQdJycH32w==&ch=KQQivQRw4tCpiM8CPUimLB2vg1nQgRDEV0ntHyPOPVaSJ_sSOMv7aw==)**
_**Defend conservatives in the states**_
The radical Left will stop at nothing in their quest to impose their harmful agenda on our states.
Democrats have promised to do the following if they take our state majorities:
* **Defund our police** and leave our communities exposed to violent mobs
* Enact **Green New Deal** type legislation that will bankrupt American businesses

name: Tim Scott
subject: The liberal elite came up short in South Carolina
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I am happy to congratulate my friend and colleague from South Carolina, Senator Lindsey Graham, on his election victory! His Democrat opponent raised over ONE HUNDRED MILLION dollars from the New York and Hollywood liberal elite and still lost. South Carolina showed the liberal elite that we cannot be bought.
Friend,

**I am happy to congratulate my friend and colleague from South Carolina, Senator Lindsey Graham, on his election victory!**

His Democrat opponent raised over ONE HUNDRED MILLION dollars from the New York and Hollywood liberal elite and still lost. South Carolina showed the liberal elite that we cannot be bought.

Let's celebrate Lindsey's fantastic victory, as well as every Republican victory in South Carolina -- like Nancy Mace winning the First Congressional District, my old seat.

**But make no mistake, the Democrats still have their sights set on South Carolina and are desperate to flip it.**

Lindsey's opponent was able to drown South Carolina in negative attack ads and turn our state into a toss-up because he raised so much money.

Democrats are trying hard to turn South Carolina into a liberal blue state and replace our conservative values with a radical socialist agenda. They don't show any sign of slowing down.

[**We must keep fighting.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/keep-fighting/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20201104_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1039988-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201104_the-liberal-elite-came-up-short-in-south-carolina)

God Bless,

Tim Scott

name: Marco Rubio
subject: What the Florida vote means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend,

**Florida voters made it clear last night:**

**The Sunshine State is _RED_ and has _ZERO_ interest in the radical Left's socialist agenda.**

I'm so proud of my state. Floridians made a statement. We showed Democrats that we've seen what's growing within their party and it has _no place_ in the Sunshine State.

We rejected the Democrats because many Floridians have experienced the cruelty of socialism firsthand. Like my family, many in Florida have seen the oppression of socialism in their homeland and came to this country in pursuit of the American Dream. As a child of immigrants I watched my parents work for that Dream each and every day. It wasn't an easy road, but they were able to work their way up in this country and provide a life for their children that would've been impossible to offer under the communist regime in Cuba.

The radical Left's recent embrace of socialism proves how blissfully ignorant they are to the reality it brings. **Their attempts to package it up as "progressive" and serve it to Americans is dangerous to the nation.** I'm proud Florida has taken a stand against the radical Left and rejected their socialist agenda, but the fight is from over. **The Democrats are not going to stop. They know I 'll be their toughest enemy in the fight to enact their socialist agenda. That's why they've already begun their plan to try and beat me in 2022. **

I know there's a lot going on right now, but we can't lose sight of what's on the horizon. [**Can you chip in $35 right now to help me and my fight against the Left 's socialist agenda?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013yhXrkqy8Q_FyprBEzutIzFA-MqCmP8PrgpsUPp9rhtWwCrliCs52zaOZDmpwD8nOaBiR0pEWkaF4ebYRwOSAXT8V-HSpI2tQLBFgARo3wp46tLlr_psoUwInZOy2dkmZzq3kF3k1zCl5-pC-V_of-maqJaV0bTa_8_THDAtvupedHgc2gI3mwe8zWIKPhzor7lX3ltRgmJ6IaI2T4oGfLFBAGLy0bmX_lZdT_mZfFyAZ6ySl1giJf8OSyKZN6yG4ynZA4KPMn3ozoj4yt0HGlBu6jodse0QZ5xH9wn912q6OT341VHdI_1wCrexP5rMA5OHu022lgs4SeXCp-CfUHdyX4VUUckIMwI3-lPc2WmJSO1xkiewX-r-ymjJcUFz8gMEua-rDVhcf-5r65HKw46PCsisSNt6dZiC7avdM9nxg6xaEbqLU-XegTDXdJ7j&c=o9US9RlXR7KCJ78-WWoS8LKJv_fp6nIZCVE1d5_T3PbE6Fe3FkD0Yw==&ch=vevmTC01dl5gMX35CD5Pu-xdAfiO8Ia9OV9N-XEPDsCYxBobkekrAg==)

They're not going to stop, Friend, and neither will I.

**The radical Left has now made me their top target. They 're building a substantial war chest in Florida as we speak.** I knew this could potentially happen, but did not know to what extent.

Just like China, the radical Left is totally opposed to the freedoms I stand for. They're targeting anyone who is in opposition to their socialist tactics.

_**We 're going to need a war chest ourselves Friend, because I refuse to stop calling out their socialist agenda and fighting for the freedoms we hold so dear in this country.**

I openly disagree and continue to expose the Democratic Party, and they HATE IT. I know all too well that I am next on their list. As we have seen many times, the Left will try to oust anyone who stands in their way. I am ready, [but I need your help, Friend.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013yhXrkqy8Q_FyprBEzutIzFA-MqCmP8PrgpsUPp9rhtWwCrliCs52zaOZDmpwD8nOaBiR0pEWkaF4ebYRwOSAXT8V-HSpI2tQLBFgARo3wp46tLlr_psoUwInZOy2dkmZzq3kF3k1zCl5-pC-V_of-maqJaV0bTa_8_THDAtvupedHgc2gI3mwe8zWIKPhzor7lX3ltRgmJ6IaI2T4oGfLFBAGLy0bmX_lZdT_mZfFyAZ6ySl1giJf8OSyKZN6yG4ynZA4KPMn3ozoj4yt0HGlBu6jodse0QZ5xH9wn912q6OT341VHdI_1wCrexP5rMA5OHu022lgs4SeXCp-CfUHdyX4VUUckIMwI3-lPc2WmJSO1xkiewX-r-ymjJcUFz8gMEua-rDVhcf-5r65HKw46PCsisSNt6dZiC7avdM9nxg6xaEbqLU-XegTDXdJ7j&c=o9US9RlXR7KCJ78-WWoS8LKJv_fp6nIZCVE1d5_T3PbE6Fe3FkD0Yw==&ch=vevmTC01dl5gMX35CD5Pu-xdAfiO8Ia9OV9N-XEPDsCYxBobkekrAg==) **T****here is no way I can withstand this storm without you.**_

clean_body: Friend, Florida voters made it clear last night: The Sunshine State is RED and has ZERO interest in the radical Left's socialist agenda. I'm so proud of my state. Floridians made a statement. We showed Democrats that we've seen what's growing within their party and it has no place in the Sunshine State. We rejected the Democrats because many Floridians have experienced the cruelty of socialism firsthand. Like my family, many in Florida have seen the oppression of socialism in their homeland and came to this country in pursuit of the American Dream. As a child of immigrants I watched my parents work for that Dream each and every day. It wasn't an easy road, but they were able to work their way up in this country and provide a life for their children that would've been impossible to offer under the communist regime in Cuba. The radical Left's recent embrace of socialism proves how blissfully ignorant they are to the reality it brings. Their attempts to package it up as "progressive" and serve it to Americans is dangerous to the nation. I'm proud Florida has taken a stand against the radical Left and rejected their socialist agenda, but the fight is from over. The Democrats are not going to stop. They know I 'll be their toughest enemy in the fight to enact their socialist agenda. That's why they've already begun their plan to try and beat me in 2022. I know there's a lot going on right now, but we can't lose sight of what's on the horizon. == They're not going to stop, Friend, and neither will I. The radical Left has now made me their top target. They 're building a substantial war chest in Florida as we speak. I knew this could potentially happen, but did not know to what extent. Just like China, the radical Left is totally opposed to the freedoms I stand for. They're targeting anyone who is in opposition to their socialist tactics. We 're going to need a war chest ourselves Friend, because I refuse to stop calling out their socialist agenda and fighting for the freedoms we hold so dear in this country. I openly disagree and continue to expose the Democratic Party, and they HATE IT. I know all too well that I am next on their list. As we have seen many times, the Left will try to oust anyone who stands in their way. I am ready, == There is no way I can withstand this storm without you. == == == == == == Friend, thank you for all your help. There is no way I could be where I am today without your support. name: Jerry Carl
subject: 🎉 HUGE victory here in south Alabama!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress
body:
I’m humbled & grateful for the amazing show of support.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/764c159e77623f71/ee51d4599106f0c6c3d6b838967d376c/32613) Fellow Conservative,
It was a long night last night, and many key 2020 races are yet to be called.
But not here in south Alabama... we scored a DECISIVE victory over the Pelosi Democrats’ campaign machine!
**I’m humbled and grateful beyond words for the trust placed in me by AL-01 voters. **
I truly cannot thank top supporters like you enough.
Together, we built an outstanding grassroots campaign to rally Republicans to fight to win, for a stronger Alabama and a stronger America. Our efforts paid off big time.
Now, I’m eager to get to work in Washington, to fight for fiscal sanity, law and order, and our conservative values and priorities. We have countless key battles ahead of us.
Thank you, again, for ALL your support in this race. I’ll never forget it, Fellow Conservative.
I’ll be in touch again soon!
\- Jerry | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/764c159e77623f71/d2a1987810dbca1cc3d6b838967d376c/32613) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/764c159e77623f71/aaef87efba61b04fc3d6b838967d376c/32613)

| Dear Friends, I wanted to take just a few minutes to thank you for all your help in making yesterday’s election so successful. We could not have done it without you. **In case you haven’t heard we won back control of the state Senate with a 14-10 majority.** It was a great day for us! Now that we have the majority, we can give Governor Sununu the team he needs to work with him on the many challenges facing our state. It won’t be easy, but we know that together we will make sure our state continues to protect the New Hampshire Advantage, help our working families, and make sure our small businesses can grow and prosper. Again, we are so grateful for your support and will continue to keep you updated on our progress. Best regards, Chuck Morse Senate Republican Leader

name: Nancy Mace
subject: We put the Lowcountry first, together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress
body:
I can’t believe I’m writing this email. I’m so fired up that I can barely type
these words, but we won.
<>
Friend,

I can’t believe I’m writing this email, but my campaign received some
incredible news early this morning and I wanted you to be one of the first to
know.

I’m so fired up that I can barely type these words, but we just won, friend!!

That’s right — the people of the Lowcountry rose up and made their voices
heard loud and clear.

I couldn’t be more grateful that you put your trust in me to represent you on
Capitol Hill.

I promise you that I will always put the Lowcountry First and the people of
our district over politics.

This campaign was one of the most exhilarating experiences of my life, but
also one of the toughest fights I’ve ever faced, and friend, I’ve seen my fair
share —being the first woman to graduate from The Citadel and raising two kids
as a single mom wasn’t easy.

I’m so proud of what we accomplished, and I couldn’t have done this without
you. You put in the time, effort, hours, and dollars that made this campaign
possible. You also made the most important contribution you could — you gave me
your vote.

I want to thank my opponent Joe Cunningham for being willing to serve and for
his work on behalf of our district.

Now, friend, this is only the beginning of the journey and there’s a lot of
work left to be done. But I’m ready to roll up my sleeve and put the Lowcountry
first in Congress.

It’s time to get to work!

Best,

Nancy Mace

Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress

295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Friend,

We will NOT give up. The Wisconsin results are too close.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20in=20Office?=
subject: Every Vote Counts. Every Vote Matters.
body:
Donald Trump Doesn't Decide the Outcome of this Election | | | |
---
| [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=9bfc389134&e=3f151f8b74)
---
Why Do We Need Moms in Office?
| | |
---
| Friends,

Last night was not supposed to be a nail biter. Even after everything that we have experienced in the last 4 years as a nation and the struggles we have faced during a global pandemic due to this administration's lack of leadership, we still have a huge divide in our country.

I am certain that we will declare political victory as soon as all votes have been counted, but the moral victory has yet to come for America.

Joe Biden will be the next President of the United States and when elected, we can set out on a path toward renewal.

Last night, many of our candidates received the results of their race after giving it their all, campaigning during a pandemic and, raising children during school shutdowns.

Once all votes are counted, we will share some good news about our victories, but until then, let's celebrate all women who showed up and fought for justice.

In 2020, women set out to build a movement, and victory comes from movements. Women and mothers united across the country in activism, ran for office for change, and spoke out for those who don’t have a voice. In 2020, we showed up and today we celebrate all of our candidates, for all that they have done this election cycle.

I am grateful for your support that you have given Moms in Office and I am truly humbled to know that so many of you put your trust in me and this organization to build a government that is more representative of all people.

With Gratitude,

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office

---

name: My Faith Votes
subject: INTERSECT: Special Election Edition
body:
| | Think. Pray. Act. at the Intersection of Faith & Politics.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iTtMewf2DL0D-tj3igeTtq6jRGqThnTlWAKKoPIcpFx5HrZmgPKQJvkYrtexXSpyqOs_EIud3NKYgfYPJbzeIrk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=1)
| In this week's Intersect, read about:
* _Trump, Biden battle for 270: Key Swing States Still Counting Votes in Tight Race_
* _Senate Majority Hangs in the Balance in These yet-to-be Determined Races_
* _Louisiana Voters Pass Pro-life Amendment: Abortion Is Not A Constitutional Right_
* _Gunmen Storm Kabul University, Killing 22, in Second Deadly Attack on Students in just over a Week_

Subscribe [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iTtMewf2DL0D-tj3igeTtq6jRGqThnTlWAKKoPIcpFx5HrZmgPKQJvkYrtexXSpyqOs_EIud3NKYgfYPJbzeIrk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=2) to receive the Intersect every Wednesday.
* * *
# Trump, Biden battle for 270: Key Swing States Still Counting Votes in Tight Race
With more than 100 million votes counted, the 2020 presidential election remains too close to call as of early Wednesday morning, several hours after the first polls closed. Due to the widespread use of mail-in ballots as a result of the coronavirus pandemic, it could take days for a winner to be declared. Several swing states, including Iowa, Minnesota, Nevada, North Carolina, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and Texas, will be accepting and counting mail-in ballots days after the election as long as they are postmarked by Election Day. For these reasons, winners have yet to be projected in several swing states. With the outcome uncertain in many of the states that will decide the election, neither candidate has accumulated the 270 electoral votes needed to clinch the presidency. According to Decision Desk HQ, President Donald Trump has accumulated 213 electoral votes, while his Democrat challenger, former Vice President Joe Biden, has accumulated 238 electoral votes. In addition to winning all of the states that he won by double digits in 2016, Trump won the states of Florida, Iowa, Ohio and Texas, which boast a combined 85 electoral votes.[ read more](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzX61HryB4MfdillBHImjj_mfOC7SlAYns_MSkkpR2vHpKs-TNAi1u0Cn_aWSm6FXiClQsTnPWldFluuhU7nQeVGuRBDktpXys6TNDyja04RuLTfv9LIBYDBTxKx5CoxHvw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=3) THINK.
You can view the electoral college map [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7JOi500mf-FuVzVC1uHaYq984DnZOnQItrKyejhlo0PJNILYZppaFNTaLzDIqzxLyA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=4). President Trump addressed the nation early Wednesday morning raising concerns of voter fraud and condemned election officials in numerous states where Democratic election officials stopped counting ballots. [Trump stated](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=PeP7ESaSqGrUN95k1AsR_Ku6WmwgMcDaJDpKXbcABr-0ARHrajjONoB_38a6Br9T3wSDCkfW-EuuqH9kXawohGgWQ04Wd7hYTpqHLMMnane9jhE8YoO2m4FtECo_AcF6xcOIuzz0VLArcpSJHI9sjeh9lH-eem306ClzdB2EH7jDAfEPqIB8zatAoShQFStI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=5), “This is a fraud to the American public. This is a fraud on the nation. This is an embarrassment to our country. We won this election,” he said. “Frankly, we did win this election. We will be taking this to the US Supreme Court. We will win this, and as far as I’m concerned, we’ve already won it.” Former Vice President Biden also addressed supporters saying, “Your patience is commendable. We knew this was going to go long, but who knew we were going to go into maybe tomorrow morning, maybe even longer. But look, we feel good about where we are, we really do. I am here to tell you tonight we believe we’re on track to win this election.” It could be days or weeks before the American people have election results. A critical swing state, [Nevada](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=h8XiT2GQOlyVJjA9qBtUZu43v_65nZy8D6_F1n74Owg5UrBCVSDy01yjbm9q16E1fW0-htBnGVmUw7lZA-pdNshzEpKUWDisvhlgKMxcC2ZKDQi4xAzNVlWD2HNoOL_8cbQzKYoOHmqKwrtM17oYnA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=6), announced it will not update election results until Thursday as thousands of mail-in ballots have yet to be counted. The governor of Pennsylvania also said the [total count in Pennsylvania](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv7oHU9POybvwiQZoVsHBGC75BBdGuxSNaf5sJXxoayQJpKvu6w5HKNogT6_FaEHqbp8RhWlViTl5uNfguvmSo8YMm2eU9deB3BY1VLWjQVMMF0rUf0mNhU3wPc4zTVkqt9vA2sFP61TDDr55UYegkuw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=7) would likely not be known today. Biden has taken a slim lead over President Trump in Michigan and Wisconsin. Some people have raised concerns of [voter fraud in Michigan](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9aTfWmE97syzTNH2V7eQjOAJJKNigSXVJM2Aw55I4Qh-xlbcjYHl66SDMp_he_XwNZ70XZLC_Qrg7s0Zq5hbHZBnNoVa0oO-n2_5fmFDL4HhWqROkVO5Uz8xd2TIDKBnuTvPvyvh3Lx0j52ZnE1WXdA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=8). One thing is certain; the race is far from over with so many swing states still undecided. Amid all of the uncertainty, we hold to the hope within the Gospel and the truth of God’s Word. Proverbs 21:1 says, “In the LORD's hand the king's heart is a stream of water that he channels toward all who please him.” Daniel 2:21 says, “He changes times and seasons; he deposes kings and raises up others. He gives wisdom to the wise and knowledge to the discerning.” PRAY.
Continue to pray for the integrity of the elections as states count the votes in the coming days. Pray for every vote to be counted and protected. Pray against any voter fraud and for a fair election in every country and swing state that has yet to be called. ACT.
If you turned in an absentee ballot and want to make sure your ballot was counted, you can select your state and track it [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7KhgymeBWCJ5z6VS6DGe2fI_9Mwe1pKXIMTRj6cyblx9-h9pJmQov2aW9GQSegf6BX7GJcdmyydTpsXhcPJ0NrvcNWjMGrElVXMJwnygw2sP&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=9).
* * *
# Senate Majority Hangs in the Balance in These yet-to-be Determined Races
A handful of too-close-to-call races in battleground states are expected to tip the balance in the fight for control of the United States Senate. At least for now, it appears that Republicans are on track to hold their majority. Here are some of the key senate races that have yet to be called. **Michigan** : Republican John James is running ahead of the Democratic incumbent Sen. Gary Peters (Mich.) 49.3% to 48.8% with 92% of the votes reported, according to the Associated Press. With roughly 10% of the vote still left to be counted, the race has not been called. It's possible that outstanding votes are primarily made up of absentee ballots which have tended to favor Democrats, so the race could still turn in Peters' favor. **North Carolina:** Despite doubt that he could retain his seat, Republican incumbent Sen. Thom Tillis (N.C.) is currently leading Democratic challenger Cal Cunningham 48.7% to 46.9% with 93% of the vote reported. A Tillis win would be another sign of relief here as the race was considered a toss-up coming into Election Day. **Georgia:** Republican incumbent Sen. David Perdue (Ga.) is hanging onto a narrow 50.8% to 46.9% lead against Democratic challenger Jon Ossoff with 91% of the vote reported. But Ossoff, who worked as an investigative journalist before running for office, is still holding out hope. Should neither candidate garner 50% of the vote, the race would go to a run-off. **Maine and Alaska:** The two other Senate races that have not yet been called are in Maine and Alaska. In Maine, Republican incumbent Sen. Susan Collins is leading Democratic challenger Sara Gideon 50.8% to 42.6% with 85% of the vote reported, and in Alaska, Republican incumbent Sen. Dan Sullivan is beating Democratic challenger Al Gross by a margin of 63.1% to 31.8% with 45% reported. While Alaska's race is nearly a sure victory for Republicans, Collins' chances in Maine were much more in doubt. The incumbent trailed by a sizable margin in the polls ahead of Election Day. If Collins holds Maine, it would be another surprise victory for Republicans. If all of the races outlined above remained the way they are and the GOP won in each, it would be a stunning victory for Republicans. It would mean they retained their 53-47 majority in the Senate, which is the way things stood coming into the election. Even if Democrats were to turn the tables and snatch victory in two of the races, it would still result in a 51-49 majority for Republicans in the Senate. If three of the six go to Democrats, that's where it gets tricky because the vice president breaks ties in the chamber and that gives a de facto majority to the party who controls the Executive Branch. [read more](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=h8XiT2GQOlyVJjA9qBtUZlu1YCzOufEG65vFtSENZqGHhnZMFZYEytnncBFHlyHQ-l-8nx5KaHWUHrtg10KYjQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=10) THINK.
You can view all the senate race results [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ByhkdA7RrYhHtdiUMWUYvH1-xV9etph20GTfpVR_We93NZ6rSR3vuV4_anJrOkPHCD3mq7ST1bXOjxJBbcyrQw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=11). Senator Lindsey Graham [held his senate seat](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7KhgymeBWCJ5z6VS6DGe2fJ0VturdkqP4dh95juCtR_k1LtWi7wVzkhLBJlTgXAotV5xJm4dx7aIR8yANFdd-nBqLQZEy_TGWTecM2RD7f6X&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=12) in South Carolina against Democrat Jaime Harrison. Harrison raised a stunning $107.6 million the most of any Senate candidate in U.S. history. Fox News [predicted early](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7KhgymeBWCJ5z6VS6DGe2fL2i4nY0vFyR-ZscDLziZSWYh_NQ2vkKz1DJPQxBAqwOESR8Djg1BUN1bHDuXLjbY1VNbrcyCt6q_zELx_3bWBc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=13) in the evening yesterday that Democrats will maintain control of the House of Representatives. One interesting race worth noting, [Republican Madison Cawthorn](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=h8XiT2GQOlyVJjA9qBtUZpE2tmY8DXSHyszcWLfCqqX1HVDIJeRrokm_mbAUrkBreVIIobL6XZNbvhcHk2dPpP732v8WDsaRp3R1E0DsinntHnseEbvygurVZqmNRkrp&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=14) won his election to represent the 11th congressional district in North Carolina and will become the youngest member of Congress at just 25 years old. While we continue to wait for the remaining senate races to be called, we encourage you to read this powerful article by our friend Dr. Jim Denison. [_Why the 2020 Election has been so Divisive, how Christians can Respond Redemptively_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzb9UM-6jSP12_aDWG47VF7Yu6nNVRcdFx21ZcUUDmn37T7JoaESQyTPy0nCZwhILCWLg87qkONP4BDgr0fHxaQcFGp7dYasGf_J7MlEaHfohz6uVGZlBLpsU2tCjpqGv2A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=15). Dr. Denison not only outlines the key reasons the 2020 elections have been especially vitriolic, but he also provides specific biblical priorities and guidance for Christians today. If you feel overwhelmed with the election results or the lack of election results, this article gives practical insight for Christians today. PRAY.
Pray that Christians would lead and shine God’s light during these challenging political times in our nation (Phillipians 3:20-21). ACT.
Do all you can today to stand for truth, share the Gospel, and spread God’s love and kindness to others. Look for God-given opportunities to reach across the aisle to those who may have voted differently from you. Consider reaching out to a neighbor, a co-worker, or a family member, and send a note or a text of encouragement (2 Corinthians 13:11).
* * *
# Louisiana Voters Pass Pro-life Amendment: Abortion Is Not A Constitutional Right
Louisiana voters approved a bipartisan constitutional amendment declaring abortion is not a constitutionally enshrined right. “Nothing in this constitution shall be construed to secure or protect a right to abortion or require the funding of abortion,” Amendment 1 reads. According to the Associated Press, the Love Life Amendment passed 65 percent to 35 percent with almost 96 percent of the state’s precincts reporting. Pro-life Democrat State Sen. Katrina Jackson penned the amendment which was co-sponsored by people on both sides of the political aisle. According to Jackson, the amendment grants more power to the legislators when it comes to evaluating abortion policy. “It’s important to understand that Amendment 1 is not a ban on abortion. It simply keeps abortion policy in the hands of our legislators rather than state judges,” Jackson wrote. “Our body of pro-life laws ensure that women are empowered with the truth about their pregnancy prior to an abortion, that minors seeking an abortion have parental consent, and that babies born alive following a botched abortion receive immediate medical care. Our law also makes sure that not a dollar of your state tax dollars fund abortion. Yet these laws and others are at risk unless we pass Amendment 1,” Jackson said. [read more ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=q_G7lXppHyLgLmXMMU9Y0PjH8u5dH9w5hvOcNtl3AO-VhOFAcKicLdVZXYAauAW6FDzMgdQnGo1AWh40MKVz3c-u1gZZypsnpa56IbYChllAfIcYwRQ6sHFkOgHhyAW8fVVRhJdpxPhAdRemms4-0iGhB40b13ZFULAAv4oc8pI&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=16) THINK.
Alliance Defending Freedom Senior Counsel Denise Burke responded, “Louisiana voters have taken an important step toward strengthening a culture of life and ending abortion on demand in their state.” Pro-life activist Lila Rose called this amendment “historic.” And, Benjamin Clapper, Executive Director of Louisiana Right to Life said, “We encourage other states to pass their own version of the Love Life Amendment. For too long, activist judges around the nation have usurped the power of state legislatures and declared a right to abortion-on-demand. It’s time we changed this in every state across America.” It’s encouraging to see legislators from both sides of the aisle come together to protect human life. Scripture is clear on the issue of the sanctity of human life (Psalm 139). And Deuteronomy 30:19-20 reminds us that we each have a choice before us to choose life. In America, we not only have the freedom to make that choice in our own lives, but we also have the privilege to make the choice with our votes as the people of Louisiana did yesterday. PRAY.
Praise God for this historic and tremendous pro-life victory in Louisiana. We pray for every mother who will be influenced by this Amendment, and we pray that they would choose life for their children. We also pray against any attacks that will come against this Louisiana constitutional amendment and ask God to thwart the devil's plan who comes to kill. We pray for life to be protected in Louisiana and for other states to follow in their lead. ACT.
If we hope to see more pro-life victories like we saw in Louisiana yesterday, we must first begin with prayer. We encourage you to spend some time in prayer today for your state. Get the My Faith Votes pro-life prayer guide [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iVxgaRuqdIZeE7yAi2abRaONrLCE88O7Cy40xjUnBUGFBNCLtMpAh3K95ANKPZ2x_Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=17) and pray for a culture of life to be advanced in your state. And, if you live in Louisiana, this guide is still for you. Pray for the pro-life awakening in your state to continue and strengthen.
* * *
# Gunmen Storm Kabul University, Killing 22, in Second Deadly Attack on Students in just over a Week
Gunmen stormed Kabul University, killing at least 22 people including students in their classrooms, on Monday and Islamic State militants claimed responsibility for what President Ashraf Ghani called a “despicable act of terror”. In a video message, Ghani, who once lectured at the university, announced a national day of mourning to honor the victims and offered his “condolences and profound sympathies to the nation” and the families of the victims.“My heart is still beating for this academic institution,” he said. “Today’s attack has left us grief-stricken.” Gunmen barged into Kabul University in the morning, killing students in their classrooms and firing on others as they fled, officials and witnesses said, in what was the second attack on an educational institution in the capital in just over a week. The three attackers killed at least 22 people, including students, and wounded 22 others before Afghan security forces shot the gunmen dead, the health ministry said. The attack was claimed by Islamic State, the jihadist group’s Amaq News Agency said. Amaq said the gunmen targeted a gathering being held to mark the completion of a training course at the university. “This is the second attack on educational institutions in Kabul ... Afghan children & youth need to feel safe going to school,” NATO Senior Civilian Representative to Afghanistan Stefano Pontecorvo said in a statement. [read more](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=_iXnL0bCffDuT3k_fuMSrFva4oyu30-U8iSzTJUv6rkRvGLNFVGhRfMQ-uuXPe72uk2ytRUfRTAaBdnbE_ztE0e3yKm5jE1q0MFw6wRkEJCiYWseFp0FbA7G_uOkZEVDjKBwT_2dPIPYPReoP2TOtpEX4tOxsQdFy2leAR813VDMadIy293Bq4nG8v3wMIEm&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=18) THINK.
The people of Kabul Afghanistan have suffered tremendously at the hands of radical Islamic extremists. This most recent terror attack is yet another heartbreaking example. According to [Open Doors International,](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=YDzITEgJp2pH9y7Nkh1bRKJ_lZKqGtzOODFxnPSa6xCNXbf_fUfJMX426a7wYvGXWyqD72ga12bNpuXk50PdZI2lD54VcCFrigscf2hpdFW3-a7D9p_Qhssyi4U-fJRJ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=19) the persecution in Afghanistan is rated “extreme.” Isalm is the official religion of the country, and Christianity exists in secret. We hold to the truth found in Proverbs 11:21 that God will not let evil go unpunished. We pray that even in this horrific crisis, people will accept Christ’s free gift of eternal life that was made possible only by Jesus’s death and resurrection on our behalf. In other important news, [American Navy SEAL Team Six](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=M3gmYtQVGobEnoHfgg7VNfH1gRNfBMt7RjfMKVg3_JYdp9GiVRJQg1VeouU0C-eBazm1Lh-ieiUUPLtSp_k2o5Ujh6wV4J9-ntA_PAAbUxanQAPb9mxI94uG3MfqRTplNVZXYPbdMQpGMfrdMa4JEw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=20) successfully rescued an abducted American missionary in Nigeria in a precision military operation. Philip Walton, a 27-year-old missionary, was kidnapped by six gunmen on October 27 while at home with his wife, young daughter, and his brother. President Trump tweeted on October 31, “Last night, our Country’s brave warriors rescued an American hostage in Nigeria. Our Nation salutes the courageous soldiers behind the daring nighttime rescue operation and celebrates the safe return of yet another American citizen!” Nigeria is ranked 12th on Open Doors’ 2020 World Watch List of countries where Christians suffer the most persecution. PRAY.
Pray for the families who lost their loved ones in this terror attack in Afghanistan. Pray for God to reveal Himself to them and that they would enter into a personal relationship with Jesus Christ as their Lord and Savior. ACT.
Take some time to shift your focus from the election results to our brothers and sisters in Christ living under extreme religious persecution around the world. Open Doors has a great outreach that allows you to write a letter directly to someone who is being persecuted for their faith. [Write a letter today](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=YDzITEgJp2pH9y7Nkh1bRA7CsGvIx2wlIhIqwNC-PzfczgU1hAAoG8Q2L97tr14b0RD8Ed7OMzRq0pUZS9HTsKv2qNGWFMQ-Ig7ZK-yQbmw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201104intersect01&n=21). 1 Corinthians 12:26 says, “If one member suffers, all suffer together; if one member is honored, all rejoice together.”

Act. at the Intersection of Faith & Politics. | In this week's Intersect, read about: Trump, Biden battle for 270: Key Swing States Still Counting Votes in Tight Race Senate Majority Hangs in the Balance in These yet-to-be Determined Races Louisiana Voters Pass Pro-life Amendment: Abortion Is Not A Constitutional Right Gunmen Storm Kabul University, Killing 22, in Second Deadly Attack on Students in just over a Week Subscribe to receive the Intersect every Wednesday. Trump, Biden battle for 270: Key Swing States Still Counting Votes in Tight Race With more than 100 million votes counted, the 2020 presidential election remains too close to call as of early Wednesday morning, several hours after the first polls closed. Due to the widespread use of mail-in ballots as a result of the coronavirus pandemic, it could take days for a winner to be declared. Several swing states, including Iowa, Minnesota, Nevada, North Carolina, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and Texas, will be accepting and counting mail-in ballots days after the election as long as they are postmarked by Election Day. For these reasons, winners have yet to be projected in several swing states. With the outcome uncertain in many of the states that will decide the election, neither candidate has accumulated the 270 electoral votes needed to clinch the presidency. According to Decision Desk HQ, President Donald Trump has accumulated 213 electoral votes, while his Democrat challenger, former Vice President Joe Biden, has accumulated 238 electoral votes. In addition to winning all of the states that he won by double digits in 2016, Trump won the states of Florida, Iowa, Ohio and Texas, which boast a combined 85 electoral votes. THINK. You can view the electoral college map . President Trump addressed the nation early Wednesday morning raising concerns of voter fraud and condemned election officials in numerous states where Democratic election officials stopped counting ballots. , “This is a fraud to the American public. This is a fraud on the nation. This is an embarrassment to our country. We won this election,” he said. “Frankly, we did win this election. We will be taking this to the US Supreme Court. We will win this, and as far as I’m concerned, we’ve already won it.” Former Vice President Biden also addressed supporters saying, “Your patience is commendable. We knew this was going to go long, but who knew we were going to go into maybe tomorrow morning, maybe even longer. But look, we feel good about where we are, we really do. I am here to tell you tonight we believe we’re on track to win this election.” It could be days or weeks before the American people have election results. A critical swing state, , announced it will not update election results until Thursday as thousands of mail-in ballots have yet to be counted. The governor of Pennsylvania also said the would likely not be known today. Biden has taken a slim lead over President Trump in Michigan and Wisconsin. Some people have raised concerns of . One thing is certain; the race is far from over with so many swing states still undecided. Amid all of the uncertainty, we hold to the hope within the Gospel and the truth of God’s Word. Proverbs 21:1 says, “In the LORD's hand the king's heart is a stream of water that he channels toward all who please him.” Daniel 2:21 says, “He changes times and seasons; he deposes kings and raises up others. He gives wisdom to the wise and knowledge to the discerning.” PRAY. Continue to pray for the integrity of the elections as states count the votes in the coming days. Pray for every vote to be counted and protected. Pray against any voter fraud and for a fair election in every country and swing state that has yet to be called. ACT. If you turned in an absentee ballot and want to make sure your ballot was counted, you can select your state and track it . Senate Majority Hangs in the Balance in These yet-to-be Determined Races A handful of too-close-to-call races in battleground states are expected to tip the balance in the fight for control of the United States Senate. At least for now, it appears that Republicans are on track to hold their majority. Here are some of the key senate races that have yet to be called. Michigan : Republican John James is running ahead of the Democratic incumbent Sen. Gary Peters (Mich.) 49.3% to 48.8% with 92% of the votes reported, according to the Associated Press. With roughly 10% of the vote still left to be counted, the race has not been called. It's possible that outstanding votes are primarily made up of absentee ballots which have tended to favor Democrats, so the race could still turn in Peters' favor. North Carolina: Despite doubt that he could retain his seat, Republican incumbent Sen. Thom Tillis (N.C.) is currently leading Democratic challenger Cal Cunningham 48.7% to 46.9% with 93% of the vote reported. A Tillis win would be another sign of relief here as the race was considered a toss-up coming into Election Day. Georgia: Republican incumbent Sen. David Perdue (Ga.) is hanging onto a narrow 50.8% to 46.9% lead against Democratic challenger Jon Ossoff with 91% of the vote reported. But Ossoff, who worked as an investigative journalist before running for office, is still holding out hope. Should neither candidate garner 50% of the vote, the race would go to a run-off. Maine and Alaska: The two other Senate races that have not yet been called are in Maine and Alaska. In Maine, Republican incumbent Sen. Susan Collins is leading Democratic challenger Sara Gideon 50.8% to 42.6% with 85% of the vote reported, and in Alaska, Republican incumbent Sen. Dan Sullivan is beating Democratic challenger Al Gross by a margin of 63.1% to 31.8% with 45% reported. While Alaska's race is nearly a sure victory for Republicans, Collins' chances in Maine were much more in doubt. The incumbent trailed by a sizable margin in the polls ahead of Election Day. If Collins holds Maine, it would be another surprise victory for Republicans. If all of the races outlined above remained the way they are and the GOP won in each, it would be a stunning victory for Republicans. It would mean they retained their 53-47 majority in the Senate, which is the way things stood coming into the election. Even if Democrats were to turn the tables and snatch victory in two of the races, it would still result in a 51-49 majority for Republicans in the Senate. If three of the six go to Democrats, that's where it gets tricky because the vice president breaks ties in the chamber and that gives a de facto majority to the party who controls the Executive Branch. THINK. You can view all the senate race results . Senator Lindsey Graham in South Carolina against Democrat Jaime Harrison. Harrison raised a stunning $107.6 million the most of any Senate candidate in U.S. history. Fox News in the evening yesterday that Democrats will maintain control of the House of Representatives. One interesting race worth noting, won his election to represent the 11th congressional district in North Carolina and will become the youngest member of Congress at just 25 years old. While we continue to wait for the remaining senate races to be called, we encourage you to read this powerful article by our friend Dr. Jim Denison. . Dr. Denison not only outlines the key reasons the 2020 elections have been especially vitriolic, but he also provides specific biblical priorities and guidance for Christians today. If you feel overwhelmed with the election results or the lack of election results, this article gives practical insight for Christians today. PRAY. Pray that Christians would lead and shine God’s light during these challenging political times in our nation (Phillipians 3:20-21). ACT. Do all you can today to stand for truth, share the Gospel, and spread God’s love and kindness to others. Look for God-given opportunities to reach across the aisle to those who may have voted differently from you. Consider reaching out to a neighbor, a co-worker, or a family member, and send a note or a text of encouragement (2 Corinthians 13:11). Louisiana Voters Pass Pro-life Amendment: Abortion Is Not A Constitutional Right Louisiana voters approved a bipartisan constitutional amendment declaring abortion is not a constitutionally enshrined right. “Nothing in this constitution shall be construed to secure or protect a right to abortion or require the funding of abortion,” Amendment 1 reads. According to the Associated Press, the Love Life Amendment passed 65 percent to 35 percent with almost 96 percent of the state’s precincts reporting. Pro-life Democrat State Sen. Katrina Jackson penned the amendment which was co-sponsored by people on both sides of the political aisle. According to Jackson, the amendment grants more power to the legislators when it comes to evaluating abortion policy. “It’s important to understand that Amendment 1 is not a ban on abortion. It simply keeps abortion policy in the hands of our legislators rather than state judges,” Jackson wrote. “Our body of pro-life laws ensure that women are empowered with the truth about their pregnancy prior to an abortion, that minors seeking an abortion have parental consent, and that babies born alive following a botched abortion receive immediate medical care. Our law also makes sure that not a dollar of your state tax dollars fund abortion. Yet these laws and others are at risk unless we pass Amendment 1,” Jackson said. THINK. Alliance Defending Freedom Senior Counsel Denise Burke responded, “Louisiana voters have taken an important step toward strengthening a culture of life and ending abortion on demand in their state.” Pro-life activist Lila Rose called this amendment “historic.” And, Benjamin Clapper, Executive Director of Louisiana Right to Life said, “We encourage other states to pass their own version of the Love Life Amendment. For too long, activist judges around the nation have usurped the power of state legislatures and declared a right to abortion-on-demand. It’s time we changed this in every state across America.” It’s encouraging to see legislators from both sides of the aisle come together to protect human life. Scripture is clear on the issue of the sanctity of human life (Psalm 139). And Deuteronomy 30:19-20 reminds us that we each have a choice before us to choose life. In America, we not only have the freedom to make that choice in our own lives, but we also have the privilege to make the choice with our votes as the people of Louisiana did yesterday. PRAY. Praise God for this historic and tremendous pro-life victory in Louisiana. We pray for every mother who will be influenced by this Amendment, and we pray that they would choose life for their children. We also pray against any attacks that will come against this Louisiana constitutional amendment and ask God to thwart the devil's plan who comes to kill. We pray for life to be protected in Louisiana and for other states to follow in their lead. ACT. If we hope to see more pro-life victories like we saw in Louisiana yesterday, we must first begin with prayer. We encourage you to spend some time in prayer today for your state. Get the My Faith Votes pro-life prayer guide and pray for a culture of life to be advanced in your state. And, if you live in Louisiana, this guide is still for you. Pray for the pro-life awakening in your state to continue and strengthen. name: Byron Donalds
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
This is AMAZING
|
---
Friend,
---
I cannot thank you enough for your support throughout this campaign.
---
Thanks to generous patriots like you, I will have the honor of representing the people of Florida's great 19th district.
---
I’m so excited to bring our pro-Trump movement to Washington and DRAIN THE SWAMP once and for all.
---
---
With so many great conservatives on my team, I know we’ll be able to achieve great things in Congress and continue to make America great.
---
I thank God every day for this amazing opportunity, and I am humbled to be able to represent so many hard working Americans. There is truly no way I can fully express my gratitude, but I’ll leave you at this:
---
I pledge to NEVER stop fighting for your future.
---
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
---

---
Rep. Byron Donalds
Congressman-elect, FL-19
---
Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress.
---
2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260,
Naples, FL 34108

clean_body: This is AMAZING | Friend, I cannot thank you enough for your support throughout this campaign. Thanks to generous patriots like you, I will have the honor of representing the people of Florida's great 19th district. I’m so excited to bring our pro-Trump movement to Washington and DRAIN THE SWAMP once and for all. With so many great conservatives on my team, I know we’ll be able to achieve great things in Congress and continue to make America great. I thank God every day for this amazing opportunity, and I am humbled to be able to represent so many hard working Americans. There is truly no way I can fully express my gratitude, but I’ll leave you at this: I pledge to NEVER stop fighting for your future. Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Rep. Byron Donalds Congressman-elect, FL-19 Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108

God bless you, and God bless America - now let's get to work!

-Randy

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Tell us about your voting experience
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e1/34a064cc/1a79a1df/702311d/2086702488/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Hi Friend - Thank you. Thank you for voting. It is clear Georgians have been motivated to make their voices heard. Over the past month, voters across the state have turned out to cast their ballot in record-breaking numbers. [Fair Fight Action is working tirelessly to end voter suppression and fight for free and fair elections in the future. We want to hear from you about your voting experience. Whether you voted in person or absentee, please share your story with us. Join the fight against voter suppression. ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e1/34a064cc/1a79a1df/702311a/2086702488/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform") I am inspired by the work you have all done to galvanize friends, families, complete strangers, and entire communities to head to the polls this election. We must ensure that every vote that was cast gets counted. **If you voted on a paper or provisional ballot in-person on Election Day, and not on a voting machine, you may need to take additional action (called "curing") to make sure your vote counted.** You only have until Friday, November 6 to cure your provisional ballot, so don't wait! Please reach out to the Georgia Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to make sure your vote is counted and your voice is heard. To confirm that you mail ballot counted, go to [www.mvp.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e1/34a064cc/1a79a1df/702311b/2086702488/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov") and enter your information on the right. Once you are in your "[My Voter Page](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e1/34a064cc/1a79a1df/702311b/2086702488/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov")," click on "Click here for Absentee Ballot Status" on the bottom left. If your ballot status is "Rejected," "Challenged," or if you have any questions about your ballot status, please call the Georgia Voter Protection Hotline immediately at 888-730-5816. [After you've made sure that your vote has been counted, I ask that you share the story of your voting experience, no matter what that story may be. Together, we will fight to protect every eligible Georgian's right to vote. ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e1/34a064cc/1a79a1df/702311a/2086702488/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform") In solidarity, Stacey Abrams
Founder, Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e1/34a064cc/1a79a1df/7023118/2086702488/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e1/34a064cc/1a79a1df/7023119/2086702488/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e1/34a064cc/1a79a1df/7023126/2086702488/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

clean_body: | "" | | Hi Friend - Thank you. Thank you for voting. It is clear Georgians have been motivated to make their voices heard. Over the past month, voters across the state have turned out to cast their ballot in record-breaking numbers. "" I am inspired by the work you have all done to galvanize friends, families, complete strangers, and entire communities to head to the polls this election. We must ensure that every vote that was cast gets counted. If you voted on a paper or provisional ballot in-person on Election Day, and not on a voting machine, you may need to take additional action (called "curing") to make sure your vote counted. You only have until Friday, November 6 to cure your provisional ballot, so don't wait! Please reach out to the Georgia Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 to make sure your vote is counted and your voice is heard. To confirm that you mail ballot counted, go to "" and enter your information on the right. Once you are in your " ""," click on "Click here for Absentee Ballot Status" on the bottom left. If your ballot status is "Rejected," "Challenged," or if you have any questions about your ballot status, please call the Georgia Voter Protection Hotline immediately at 888-730-5816. "" In solidarity, Stacey Abrams Founder, Fair Fight Action | ---|---|--- | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2020 Fair Fight Action, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. "" | | Paid for by Fair Fight Action

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz Cronies Go Down Last Night
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_cronies_go_down&n=1)
---
Peter \-- You've heard me say it countless times: We Need Four More Democrats to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Well, if you aren't able to get them to come your way on a vote, then you take the message to their voters.
## **And that's just what we did with your support!**
At least three, maybe four (results still pending) of our DFL targets were fired last night thanks to YOU! Brad Tabke, John Persell, Jeff Brand and Jeanne Poppe were rejected by their voters in yesterday's election. We've been running ads against these Walz' cronies for months now, and in the case of some, spent tens of thousands of dollars recently to make sure every single voter knew that their politicians were responsible for the shutdown. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/dfl_targets_go_down?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_cronies_go_down&n=2) **Looks like the ads that YOU supported were highly effective. And I could not be more thankful for your generosity.** But the battle does not end with the election. Most people in politics are folding up the tables and stacking the chairs. Not Action 4 Liberty. We not only **MUST FIRE TIM WALZ** in 2 years...or sooner. We also have another chance to End Walz' Emergency Powers just around the corner. Walz has to call back the legislature again next week if he wants to continue his Emergency Powers for another 30 days. As winter approaches, our Tyrant-in-the-Making Walz is on the cusp of shutting down our schools and possibly our businesses again. There's no end in sight to what he thinks he can do to our liberties. That's why Action 4 Liberty will use the election results as a spring board to turn up the heat against our out-of-control state government. They've seen the impact we can make and now they must vote the right way, or suffer future electoral defeats. **Not only did we get rid of that crony politician Brad Tabke in Shakopee, but we also got a liberty champion elected with Erik Mortensen.** Recruiting top notch candidates like Erik Mortensen is a big part of what Action 4 Liberty does. This is how we plan to make fundamental reforms in Minnesota that bring back our liberty.
## [LEARN MORE](https://www.action4liberty.com/dfl_targets_go_down?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_cronies_go_down&n=3)
Stay tuned to Action 4 Liberty as we prepare our weapons for next week's battle to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Thank you for all your support so far. **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
****
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_cronies_go_down&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_cronies_go_down&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_cronies_go_down&n=6), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: A Message of Gratitude from Pat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Going forward, we must hold our Representative in Congress accountable, and We, the People, must stay vigilant. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=75a0c3ace7&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Thank you for supporting this campaign and our shared values. Your exemplary goodness and multiple generosities are sources of great hope.

Regardless of the outcome of yesterday’s election, our path forward as a Nation and in this Congressional District remains a renewed commitment to Dignity and Justice for All, not the few. Additionally, our path forward requires the reclaiming of our voice and values in Washington. We must reclaim our Constitutional and moral authority as We the People if our Nation is to continue and contribute internationally toward the common good.

Now, more than ever, good government requires our Hoosier work ethic, and mandates our understanding of hospitality where all have a seat at the table. In our national crisis of COVID-19, we must pursue just economic policies by which the hungry are fed, the naked are clothed, and the thirsty are given drink. Now more than ever, we must heal the sick through access to healthcare, and we must not abandon the imprisoned to the immorality of racist, profit driven penal systems.

The forces at work in our Nation, seeking to divide us one from the other, are virulent and pernicious. They include financial corruption, racism, and the subjugation of women and sexual minorities. They also include an authoritarianism and religious licentiousness in our federal government that are attacking our 1st and 14th Amendment liberties –– while also attacking our Nation’s commitment to reason, evidence, and science which are the bases of our rule of law, democratic norms, and political decency.

Going forward, we must hold our Representative in Congress accountable, and We, the People, must stay vigilant.

With a full and grateful heart,
---
|
---
| Pat
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=7ec57fcc7c&e=5886ca081d)

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: U.S. Loses $19 Billion in Afghanistan Reconstruction Funds to Fraud, Waste, Abuse

A section on fraud includes cases of crimes involving federal procurement and contract fraud as well as theft, corruption, bribery of government employees and public officials.

# [U.S. Loses $19 Billion in Afghanistan Reconstruction Funds to Fraud, Waste, Abuse](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51965&L=21137&F=H&)
Afghanistan reconstruction has been a huge and well-chronicled debacle that continues fleecing American taxpayers nearly two decades after its inception. Judicial Watch has reported on the various boondoggles over the years, most of them documented in tremendous detail by the SIGAR. Highlights include the mysterious disappearance of nearly half a billion dollars in oil destined for the Afghan National Army, a $335 million Afghan power plant that is seldom used and an $18.5 million renovation for a prison that remains unfinished and unused years after the U.S.-funded work began. Over the summer, the U.S. government got slammed in an audit for spending tens of millions of dollars on useless and ineffective drug addiction programs in Afghanistan as part of the reconstruction effort. In a scathing report, the SIGAR blasts the U.S. for not knowing the impact of its investment and failing to conduct site visits to project locations or maintain required files or records.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51965&L=21137&F=H&)

China unleashed a deadly virus on the world and covered it up, resulting in the preventable deaths of countless thousands across the globe.
